gravity_link: Essential for proprioception, which provides the gravity reference frame for posture control.
spine_curvature_link: Loss of function mutations cause congenital scoliosis; asymmetric expression in paraspinal muscles in AIS. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1602812)
justification: Direct link between gravity sensing (proprioception) and spinal alignment.

gravity_link: Regulates migration of muscle precursors and formation of dorsal horn neurons involved in proprioception/gravity sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Top GWAS hit for Adolescent Idiopathic Scoliosis (AIS). (DOI: 10.1038/ng.814)
justification: Major genetic driver of AIS with clear mechanistic link to postural tone.

gravity_link: Linked to PIEZO1-Primary Cilia axis; essential for sensing flow/load.
spine_curvature_link: Deletion causes scoliosis; PIEZO1-cilia axis mediates stress response in AIS. (PMID: 41194970)
justification: Direct link via PIEZO1-cilia axis.

gravity_link: Microfibrils provide long-range elasticity and sequester TGF-beta, responding to tissue stretch.
spine_curvature_link: Marfan syndrome patients have high prevalence of scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1000501)
justification: Major structural determinant of spine elasticity.

gravity_link: Senses mechanical overload; expression upregulates in compressed regions.
spine_curvature_link: Scoliotic growth plates show convex-concave asymmetry in PIEZO1 expression; mediates ferroptosis in vertebral dysplasia. (PMC12533149)
justification: Direct mechanistic link to growth plate asymmetry in scoliosis.

gravity_link: Nuclear translocation is directly regulated by mechanical stiffness and gravity loading forces.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates osteoblast differentiation and vertebral growth; deletion leads to skeletal defects.
justification: Central hub of cellular mechanotransduction.

gravity_link: Ciliary function is critical for detecting fluid flow and potentially gravity vectors (statocysts analogy).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations found in familial AIS; causes ciliary defects and spinal curvature in zebrafish. (DOI: 10.1172/JCI77262)
justification: Direct genetic cause of scoliosis linked to ciliary geometry.

gravity_link: Integrins are the primary cellular gravity/load sensors via focal adhesions.
spine_curvature_link: Conditional deletion in cartilage leads to scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1073/pnas.1513252112)
justification: Primary gravity sensor at cell-ECM interface.

gravity_link: Required for ciliary formation and flow sensing (gravity proxy).
spine_curvature_link: Conditional knockout leads to scoliosis in zebrafish. (PMID: 9441191)
justification: Essential for ciliary structure and gravity sensing.

gravity_link: Major load-bearing proteoglycan in IVD/cartilage; resists gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Loss leads to disc degeneration and height loss. (DOI: 10.1002/humu.1380020102 implied)
justification: Primary structural resistor of gravity load.

gravity_link: Paralog of YAP, acts as a mechanosensor of matrix stiffness and gravity-derived stress.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for skeletal development; deficiency causes osteopenia and spinal deformities.
justification: Key partner of YAP in mechanosensing.

gravity_link: GPR126 is a mechanosensitive GPCR; essential for intervertebral disc maintenance under mechanical load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations associated with AIS; required for spinal alignment in zebrafish. (DOI: 10.1016/j.neuron.2014.05.022)
justification: Mechanosensitive receptor directly linked to spine integrity.

gravity_link: Actin cytoskeleton crosslinker, responds to mechanical stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocarpotarsal Synostosis Syndrome with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1319)
justification: Structural integrator of stress and segmentation.

gravity_link: Regulates somite boundary formation (the 'clock'), establishing structural units.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocostal Dysostosis (severe spinal malformation). (DOI: 10.1086/302826)
justification: Critical for vertebral segmentation integrity.

gravity_link: Ciliary function detects fluid flow (gravity proxy).
spine_curvature_link: Novel mutations associated with AIS; causes severe scoliosis in zebrafish via CSF flow defects. (PMID: 33156271)
justification: Strong genetic link involving the CSF flow pathway.

gravity_link: Regulates chondrogenesis under load; maintains IVD integrity against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Gene therapy target for IVD degeneration. (PMC4123440)
justification: Master regulator of gravity-resisting tissue.

gravity_link: Core PCP component aligning tissues against stress lines.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations predispose to Congenital Vertebral Malformations (CVM) and scoliosis. (TMC 2227)
justification: PCP disruption directly links to vertebral defects.

gravity_link: Regulates somitogenesis timing; establishes axial pattern.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations linked to congenital scoliosis and segmentation defects. (Genes & Dev)
justification: Critical for vertebral segmentation timing.

gravity_link: Planar Cell Polarity (PCP) aligns cells against tissue stress lines (gravity).
spine_curvature_link: Rare variants associated with AIS; essential for vertebral shape. (DOI: 10.1371/journal.pgen.1002843)
justification: PCP pathway is fundamental to body axis linearity.

gravity_link: Regulates convergent extension movements, resisting gravity-induced spreading.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause scoliosis in zebrafish and are found in AIS patients. (DOI: 10.1038/ncomms1352)
justification: Core PCP component linked to spinal curvature.

gravity_link: Major structural component resisting compressive gravity loads in spine.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause spondyloepiphyseal dysplasia and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1002/humu.1380020102)
justification: Primary gravity-resisting molecule in the spine.

gravity_link: Regulates somite segmentation clock; timing errors lead to hemivertebrae.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Congenital Scoliosis (CS). (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1405829)
justification: Fundamental to vertebral segmentation symmetry.

gravity_link: Central mediator of integrin mechanotransduction and gravity response.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for osteoblast response to load; deletion affects bone formation.
justification: Key signal transducer for gravity sensing.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive ion channel in cilia (flow/bending).
spine_curvature_link: Partner of PKD1L1; essential for left-right asymmetry and spine straightness in zebrafish.
justification: Ciliary mechanosensor linked to asymmetry.

gravity_link: Notch signaling component for segmentation.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocostal Dysostosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0502-385)
justification: Notch ligand essential for somite boundaries.

gravity_link: Cell-cell adhesion, transmits tension across tissues.
spine_curvature_link: Asymmetric expression implicated in curvature.
justification: Transmits mechanical information between cells.

gravity_link: Regulates osteogenesis and limb development under load.
spine_curvature_link: Novel variants associated with Congenital Scoliosis; signaling reduced in patients. (PMID: 34440300)
justification: Key growth factor receptor linked to congenital spinal defects.

gravity_link: Establishes structural units (somites) resisting gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocostal Dysostosis; defects lead to late-onset scoliosis due to muscle-spine mismatch. (PMID: 34440615)
justification: Proven segmentation defect link to spinal malformation.

gravity_link: Regulates bone turnover and chondrocyte differentiation under load.
spine_curvature_link: Jansen Metaphyseal Chondrodysplasia causes scoliosis. (NBK616087)
justification: Key regulator of bone response to load.

gravity_link: PCP component; localization affected by mutations.
spine_curvature_link: Linked to Spina Bifida and craniorachischisis. (CDC 22582)
justification: PCP polarity defect links to neural tube/spine.

gravity_link: Cytoskeleton remodels under microgravity (PNAS 2000).
spine_curvature_link: Essential for cell stiffness and mechanosensitivity.
justification: Fundamental gravity-responsive cytoskeletal element.

gravity_link: Microtubule self-organization is gravity-dependent (PNAS 2000).
spine_curvature_link: Structural integrity against compression.
justification: Gravity-dependent self-assembly demonstrated in vitro.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive ion channel activated by osmotic and mechanical stress (gravity load).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause metatropic dysplasia and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.667)
justification: Direct mechanosensor in chondrocytes.

gravity_link: PCP pathway component aligning tissues against stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause neural tube defects; PCP is key for spine straightening.
justification: PCP determinant of tissue polarity.

gravity_link: Nucleates collagen fibril assembly, determining fiber diameter and mechanical strength.
spine_curvature_link: Stickler syndrome (Type II) causes scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1002/ajmg.1320570103)
justification: Controls collagen fibril mechanics.

gravity_link: Essential for muscle cell adhesion to ECM, resisting gravity load.
spine_curvature_link: Early-onset LAMA2-related dystrophy causes severe, progressive scoliosis. (PMC7545609)
justification: Critical for muscle-matrix coupling; loss leads to severe curvature.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive expression in endothelial cells (AHA).
spine_curvature_link: Regulates bone formation/resorption balance.
justification: Shear stress modulates expression.

gravity_link: Non-canonical Wnt signaling in mechanotransduction (Frontiers).
spine_curvature_link: Regulates tissue polarity and orientation.
justification: Mechanotransduction signaling mediator.

gravity_link: Cartilage Oligomeric Matrix Protein; organizes collagen to resist load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Pseudoachondroplasia with associated spinal curvature.
justification: Critical for matrix integrity under load.

gravity_link: Detects cerebrospinal fluid flow in central canal; flow dynamics are gravity-influenced.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause scoliosis in zebrafish and humans. (DOI: 10.1038/s41467-018-06283-3)
justification: Links CSF flow sensing to spine straightness.

gravity_link: Notochord (hydrostatic skeleton) secretion; provides initial gravity resistance.
spine_curvature_link: Modulation affects vertebral shape and disc formation. VACTERL syndrome.
justification: Morphogen establishing the gravity axis.

gravity_link: Master osteogenic factor; expression is upregulated by mechanical load (gravity).
spine_curvature_link: Cleidocranial dysplasia involves spinal abnormalities; essential for vertebral ossification.
justification: Master regulator of bone response to load.

gravity_link: Regulates somite boundary formation.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocostal Dysostosis type 3 with severe vertebral defects. (OMIM: 609813)
justification: Notch modulator essential for vertebral segmentation.

gravity_link: Kinesin motor for ciliary transport; cilia are potential gravity sensors.
spine_curvature_link: Associated with AIS susceptibility. (DOI: 10.1093/hmg/ddq172)
justification: Ciliary motor protein linked to scoliosis.

gravity_link: Caveolae flatten under mechanical tension; reduced in microgravity.
spine_curvature_link: Required for notochord mechanical integrity; loss in zebrafish leads to kinking (scoliosis-like).
justification: Membrane tension sensor linked to notochord mechanics.

gravity_link: Perlecan; mechanosensor in lacuno-canalicular system of bone.
spine_curvature_link: Deficiency leads to Schwartz-Jampel syndrome with skeletal abnormalities (kyphoscoliosis).
justification: Key mechanosensory ECM component.

gravity_link: Forms filamentous networks in cartilage; contributes to stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Linked to idiopathic scoliosis susceptibility in some populations. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ygeno.2007.03.010)
justification: Structural component of cartilage matrix.

gravity_link: Wnt signaling responds to mechanical load (osteocyte mechanotransduction).
spine_curvature_link: Crucial for bone mass regulation and vertebral formation.
justification: Key signaling pathway in bone mechanobiology.

gravity_link: BMP antagonist; balances proliferation/differentiation in growth plate under load.
spine_curvature_link: Variants linked to bone density and potentially structural defects.
justification: Regulates growth plate sensitivity.

gravity_link: Cytoskeletal remodeling in microgravity; essential for cell stiffness. (Wuest et al., 2025, doi:10.3389/frspt.2025.1677728)
spine_curvature_link: General link to mesenchymal cell mechanics; upregulation in compressed discs.
justification: Intermediate filament responsive to gravity loading.

gravity_link: Drives muscle gene expression changes in microgravity. (PMC5515518)
spine_curvature_link: Protects against IVD degeneration; decline linked to aging spine.
justification: Metabolic regulator of muscle response to unloading.

gravity_link: Secreted glycoprotein; modulates BMP signaling in osteogenesis.
spine_curvature_link: Overexpression implicated in high bone mass and potential structural anomalies.
justification: Emerging candidate in bone morphogenesis.

gravity_link: Hox genes specify vertebral identity along the A-P axis (gravity axis).
spine_curvature_link: Disruption leads to vertebral patterning defects.
justification: Positional identity gene.

gravity_link: Upregulated in microgravity, arresting osteoblast growth. (Blaber et al., 2013, PMC3630201)
spine_curvature_link: Involved in intervertebral disc senescence.
justification: Key marker of microgravity-induced cell cycle arrest.

gravity_link: Nuclear lamina scales with tissue stiffness; central mechanotransducer (Swift et al., 2013).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause LMNA-CMD and EDMD2/3 with severe scoliosis. (PMC4105307)
justification: Direct link between nuclear mechanotransduction and spinal stability.

gravity_link: Required for sclerotome differentiation and vertebral body formation (gravity resisting units).
spine_curvature_link: Undulated mouse mutants show severe vertebral defects and scoliosis. (PMID: 7875377)
justification: Essential for vertebral structural integrity.

gravity_link: Inhibits chondrocyte maturation; modulates stress response in cartilage.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylo-megaepiphyseal-metaphyseal dysplasia (SMMD) with scoliosis. (PMC7860120)
justification: Regulates cartilage growth under load.

gravity_link: Interface between muscle and ECM; critical for force transmission.
spine_curvature_link: Ullrich CMD and Bethlem Myopathy feature prominent scoliosis. (PMC8283577)
justification: Key for muscle-matrix mechanical coupling.

gravity_link: LIM domains act as mechanosensors; mutations cause Reducing Body Myopathy.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations lead to rigid spine syndrome and severe scoliosis. (PMC11978423)
justification: Muscle mechanosensor linked to spinal rigidity.

gravity_link: BMP family member regulating vertebral segmentation and fusion.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Klippel-Feil syndrome (fused vertebrae/scoliosis). (MedlinePlus)
justification: Direct cause of vertebral fusion defects.

gravity_link: Mediator of Wnt/PCP signaling; establishes tissue polarity against stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Robinow Syndrome with hemivertebrae and scoliosis. (PMC4385193)
justification: PCP mediator linked to segmentation defects.

gravity_link: Wnt co-receptor regulating bone mass in response to load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations alter anabolic response to loading; osteoporosis-pseudoglioma syndrome. (Frontiers)
justification: Key regulator of bone mechanoadaptation.

gravity_link: Connects nucleus to cytoskeleton; essential for force transmission.
spine_curvature_link: Deficiency causes ataxia and arthrogryposis with spinal deformities. (GeneReviews)
justification: LINC complex component essential for cellular mechanics.

gravity_link: Regulates calcium release for muscle contraction (postural tone).
spine_curvature_link: Central Core Disease is strongly associated with congenital scoliosis. (PM&R)
justification: Essential for muscle tone maintenance.

gravity_link: Regulates sclerotome development and vertebral formation.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Klippel-Feil syndrome. (KEGG)
justification: Transcription factor for vertebral somites.

gravity_link: Involved in vertebral development and segmentation.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Klippel-Feil syndrome and skeletal defects. (CHOP)
justification: Linked to vertebral fusion.

gravity_link: PCP component aligning cells against stress lines.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause progressive myoclonus epilepsy; PCP defects link to spine.
justification: PCP pathway member.

gravity_link: Functional unloading alters m6A RNA methylation in muscle, regulating atrophy (Sun et al., 2023).
spine_curvature_link: ROS-METTL3-ESR1 axis drives paraspinal muscle asymmetry in AIS (Shao et al., 2025).
justification: Key epigenetic regulator linking oxidative stress to muscle asymmetry.

gravity_link: Estrogen deficiency accelerates bone loss in space; key regulator of mechanical loading response.
spine_curvature_link: Suppressed by METTL3 in AIS paraspinal muscles; polymorphisms linked to curve severity.
justification: Mechanosensitive receptor linking hormonal status to spinal stability.

gravity_link: Primary driver of IVD ECM degradation under simulated microgravity (Chen et al., 2025).
spine_curvature_link: ECM degradation leads to disc wedging and curvature progression.
justification: Direct enzymatic driver of microgravity-induced disc degeneration.

gravity_link: Upregulated in IVD cells under microgravity; degrades proteoglycans (Chen et al., 2025).
spine_curvature_link: Polymorphisms associated with disc degeneration and scoliosis susceptibility.
justification: Key protease in load-dependent disc remodeling.

gravity_link: Drives marrow adipogenesis at expense of osteogenesis in microgravity (Pandit et al., 2025).
spine_curvature_link: Paraspinal muscle fatty infiltration is a hallmark of progressive scoliosis.
justification: Regulates the muscle-to-fat switch observed in unloading and scoliosis.

gravity_link: Crosslinks collagen/elastin; activity is modulated by mechanical load.
spine_curvature_link: Inhibition leads to lathyrism (spinal deformities); essential for spine stability.
justification: Critical enzyme for establishing tissue stiffness against gravity.

gravity_link: Structural collagen essential for cartilage stiffness and load resistance.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Stickler syndrome and Otospondylomegaepiphyseal dysplasia with scoliosis.
justification: Structural collagen linking hearing loss to spinal defects.

gravity_link: Ciliary flow sensing component (fluid flow as gravity proxy).
spine_curvature_link: Key for Left-Right asymmetry; mutations cause cystic kidney disease and skeletal defects.
justification: Essential for ciliary mechanosensation and body axis symmetry.

gravity_link: Mechanosensor in cilia/bone (polycystin complex with PKD2).
spine_curvature_link: ADPKD patients have higher prevalence of spinal abnormalities.
justification: Mechanotransduction partner of PKD2 in ciliary sensing.

gravity_link: Mitochondrial ROS is a major driver of spaceflight induced cellular damage (Shao et al., 2025).
spine_curvature_link: Oxidative stress in paraspinal muscles contributes to asymmetry and AIS progression.
justification: Mitochondrial antioxidant defending against unloading-induced ROS.

gravity_link: Inhibition leads to muscle growth; key target for preventing atrophy in microgravity. (Smith et al., 2020)
spine_curvature_link: Muscle asymmetry and weakness contribute to curve progression in AIS.
justification: Strong muscle link; potential therapeutic target for unloading.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive osteocyte-secreted inhibitor of Wnt; upregulated in unloading (bone loss). (Spatz et al., 2015)
spine_curvature_link: Regulates vertebral bone density; inhibition increases bone mass.
justification: Direct mechanosensor in bone; key for microgravity bone loss.

gravity_link: Notch signaling is sensitive to fluid shear stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Alagille syndrome (butterfly vertebrae) and Hajdu-Cheney syndrome (severe osteoporosis/scoliosis). (Isidor et al., 2011)
justification: Linked to vertebral segmentation and bone mass.

gravity_link: Regulates timing of somitogenesis (segmentation clock).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocostal Dysostosis and vertebral segmentation defects. (McInerney-Leo et al., 2015)
justification: Essential for vertebral segmentation pattern.

gravity_link: Mechanotransduction regulates IHH in chondrocytes. (Wu et al., 2001)
spine_curvature_link: Essential for vertebral body growth and ossification; mutations cause brachydactyly A1.
justification: Key regulator of growth plate ossification under load.

gravity_link: Hemichannels open in response to mechanical stress; essential for osteocyte network. (Jamsheer et al., 2010)
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Oculodentodigital Dysplasia with spinal anomalies.
justification: Essential for osteocyte mechanotransduction network.

gravity_link: Recruited to stress fibers under tension; gravity sensing at focal adhesions. (Hoffman et al., 2012)
spine_curvature_link: Regulates cell mechanics; potential link via actin remodeling.
justification: Mechanosensitive protein at focal adhesions.

gravity_link: Bardet-Biedl Syndrome protein; cilia are gravity/flow sensors.
spine_curvature_link: BBS patients have high prevalence of scoliosis. (Alvarez-Satta et al., 2017)
justification: Ciliary component linked to syndromic scoliosis.

gravity_link: Controls ciliary gating and signaling.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Meckel-Gruber/Joubert syndromes; rpgrip1l mutant zebrafish develop scoliosis (eLife 2024).
justification: Strong recent evidence linking ciliary defect to scoliosis.

gravity_link: Master regulator of motile cilia (flow sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Upregulated in rpgrip1l scoliosis models; essential for L-R asymmetry. (eLife 2024)
justification: Master regulator of motile cilia.

gravity_link: Linked to Weiss-Kruszka Syndrome; potential neural crest hyper-proliferation.
spine_curvature_link: Patients with ZNF462 variants frequently present with scoliosis. (Weiss et al., 2017)
justification: Syndromic link to scoliosis via neural crest.

gravity_link: Mechanically induced in osteocytes and disc cells (COX2).
spine_curvature_link: Elevated in degenerative disc disease and scoliosis. (PMC11470263)
justification: Inflammatory mediator in mechanotransduction.

gravity_link: Actin crosslinker that acts as a mechanosensor, unfolding under tension to regulate integrin binding.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Otopalatodigital spectrum disorders and Ehlers-Danlos-like syndromes with frequent scoliosis. (PMC12493046)
justification: Direct mechanosensor linking cytoskeletal tension to ECM signaling; strong genetic link.

gravity_link: Downstream effector of TGF-beta; TGF-beta release is mechanically regulated by ECM stretch (FBN1).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Loeys-Dietz syndrome, where scoliosis is a major feature. (Marfan Trust)
justification: Key effector of the mechanically-regulated TGF-beta pathway; syndromic scoliosis link.

gravity_link: Connects cytoskeleton to ECM (costamere), protecting muscle from contraction-induced mechanical damage and gravity load.
spine_curvature_link: Duchenne Muscular Dystrophy patients have very high prevalence of severe, progressive scoliosis. (SciELO)
justification: Essential for maintenance of muscle tone against gravity; loss leads to collapse.

gravity_link: Essential for motile cilia function (dynein assembly), which are flow/gravity sensors.
spine_curvature_link: Novel rare variation associated with AIS; downregulation found in AIS patients; causes curvature in zebrafish. (Spine J 2025, PMID: 39662682)
justification: Strong recent evidence (2025) linking motile cilia dysfunction to AIS.

gravity_link: Kinesin motor in Hedgehog pathway; cilia are flow/gravity sensors.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations in KIF7 implicated in Idiopathic Scoliosis in humans and axial curvatures in zebrafish. (ResearchGate)
justification: Ciliary motor protein with direct genetic implication in scoliosis.

gravity_link: Regulates EMT and osteoblast differentiation under mechanical constraints.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Saethre-Chotzen syndrome, which includes spinal abnormalities and scoliosis. (MedlinePlus)
justification: Developmental regulator linked to syndromic spinal defects.

gravity_link: Highly mechanosensitive matricellular protein; upregulated by load in bone and PDL.
spine_curvature_link: Involved in regulating vertebral bone mass; linked to spinal degenerative diseases. (Frontiers)
justification: Mechanosensitive ECM component regulating bone density.

gravity_link: Neurofibromin regulates Ras/MAPK; loss alters cytoskeletal contractility and mechanosensitivity.
spine_curvature_link: Dystrophic scoliosis is a hallmark of Neurofibromatosis Type 1. (DOI: 10.5435/JAAOS-D-19-00105)
justification: Direct causative link to dystrophic scoliosis and mechanotransduction.

gravity_link: Major load-bearing collagen in bone; expression regulated by gravity/loading.
spine_curvature_link: Osteogenesis Imperfecta (Type I/III/IV) features severe progressive scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.spam.2014.11.002)
justification: Primary structural failure against gravity in OI.

gravity_link: Motile cilia sense/generate flow; essential for distinguishing gravity vector vs fluid shear.
spine_curvature_link: Primary Ciliary Dyskinesia patients often have scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1183/09031936.00046808)
justification: Ciliary motility defect linked to laterality and spine.

gravity_link: Essential for ciliary motility and fluid flow sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause PCD; zebrafish kurnegal mutants have curly tails (scoliosis). (DOI: 10.1091/mbc.E13-05-0235)
justification: Strong zebrafish evidence linking ciliary motility to curvature.

gravity_link: Microtubule-binding protein in axoneme; required for ciliary motility.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause spine curvature in zebrafish and PCD in humans. (DOI: 10.1073/pnas.1002517107)
justification: Ciliary motility protein linked to axis straightening.

gravity_link: Crosslinks collagen telopeptides, critical for bone stiffness and load resistance.
spine_curvature_link: Bruck syndrome (osteoporosis + congenital contractures) includes scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1002/humu.20573)
justification: Enzyme defining collagen mechanical properties.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive at adherens junctions; nuclear translocation modulated by strain.
spine_curvature_link: Conditional deletion in osteoblasts leads to vertebral deformities. (DOI: 10.1002/jbmr.264)
justification: Key Wnt effector and mechanotransducer.

gravity_link: Antagonizes BMP to fine-tune bone formation under load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause symphalangism and vertebral fusions (Klippel-Feil like). (DOI: 10.1038/ng0399-255)
justification: Regulator of vertebral segmentation and fusion.

gravity_link: Central to PI3K/Akt pathway, activated by integrins/mechanical stress.
spine_curvature_link: Proteus syndrome (AKT1 mutation) causes distorting overgrowth and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1104017)
justification: Major growth regulator causing asymmetry when mutated.

gravity_link: Co-SMAD for TGF-beta/BMP, pathways regulated by mechanical strain.
spine_curvature_link: Myhre syndrome causes short stature, stiff joints, and spinal anomalies. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.985)
justification: TGF-beta pathway component linked to syndromic spine defects.

gravity_link: Regulates stress fibers and actomyosin contractility, the primary cellular response to gravity.
spine_curvature_link: RhoA pathway modulation rescues spinal defects in some models; essential for neural crest. (PMID: 21474759)
justification: Master regulator of cytoskeletal tension.

gravity_link: Generates non-muscle cortical tension, essential for cell shape in gravity.
spine_curvature_link: MYH9-related disorders can include skeletal defects; key for notochord mechanics. (GeneReviews)
justification: Generates cellular tension countering deformation.

gravity_link: Modulates collagen fibril diameter and bone mass response to unloading.
spine_curvature_link: Deficient mice develop osteoporosis and potential spinal deformities. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1098-82)
justification: ECM regulator of bone quality and mechanics.

gravity_link: Crosslinker between membrane and actin; stabilizes cell cortex against deformation.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for notochord morphogenesis and spine alignment in zebrafish. (PMID: 21215259)
justification: Membrane-cytoskeleton linker.

gravity_link: Links ion channels to actin cytoskeleton; scaffolding for mechanocomplexes.
spine_curvature_link: Interacts with PCP proteins; loss affects bone quality and potentially alignment.
justification: Scaffold protein linking signaling to structure.

gravity_link: Ciliary transition zone protein essential for sensing flow/gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Astrogliosis in ciliary mutants drives scoliosis via neuroinflammation (eLife 2024).
justification: Novel astrogliosis mechanism linking ciliary defects to spine.

gravity_link: TGF-beta signaling is mechanically regulated by ECM stretch.
spine_curvature_link: Deletion in collagen-expressing cells leads to IVD defects and spinal deformity (Loeys-Dietz).
justification: Key signaling receptor for load-dependent tissue maintenance.

gravity_link: Modulates TGF-beta bioavailability and microfibril assembly under load.
spine_curvature_link: Aberrant interaction with LTBP4 associated with AIS; Geleophysic dysplasia.
justification: Regulates microfibril tension and signaling in AIS.

gravity_link: Binds TGF-beta to ECM, releasing it upon mechanical strain.
spine_curvature_link: Partner of ADAMTSL2 in AIS pathogenesis.
justification: Mechanosensitive TGF-beta anchor linked to AIS.

gravity_link: Constitutive activation reduces nuclear elasticity and impairs mechanotransduction.
spine_curvature_link: PROS/CLOVES syndromes feature scoliosis; vascular malformations.
justification: Nuclear mechanics and mechanotransduction failure.

gravity_link: Regulates collagen fibril diameter and tissue tensile strength.
spine_curvature_link: Classical Ehlers-Danlos syndrome features scoliosis.
justification: Structural determinant of tissue stiffness.

gravity_link: Tenascin-X determines tissue elasticity and stability against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Deficiency causes Ehlers-Danlos syndrome with spinal laxity.
justification: Essential for ECM elastic properties.

gravity_link: Cathepsin K mediates IVD matrix remodeling under load.
spine_curvature_link: Upregulated in degenerative disc disease; constitutive in IVD.
justification: Key enzyme for load-driven disc remodeling.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive ion channel contributing to light touch and sensory feedback.
spine_curvature_link: Potential role in proprioceptive feedback loops.
justification: Mechanosensory channel distinct from Piezo.

gravity_link: Upregulated in degenerative IVD cells; response to stress.
spine_curvature_link: Marks senescence and apoptosis in scoliotic discs.
justification: Marker of mechanical stress-induced senescence.

gravity_link: Upregulated in degenerative discs; cell cycle arrest.
spine_curvature_link: Linked to IVD degeneration and potential asymmetry.
justification: Senescence marker in loaded tissues.

gravity_link: Unfolds under cytoskeletal tension (molecular spring), recruiting actin regulators.
spine_curvature_link: Polymorphisms in focal adhesion genes are linked to AIS susceptibility. (DOI: 10.1038/s41598-019-49200-y)
justification: Strong mechanotransduction link via focal adhesion tension.

gravity_link: Primary force transmission link between integrins and actin; rod domain unfolds under tension.
spine_curvature_link: Conditional deletion in osteoblasts leads to osteopenia and spinal deformities. (DOI: 10.1371/journal.pgen.1006886)
justification: Fundamental force transmission molecule.

gravity_link: Regulates ciliogenesis and actin assembly; essential for sensing fluid flow.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause severe vertebral segmentation defects and rib fusions (CPLANE). (DOI: 10.1038/ng.3558)
justification: Strong PCP/Cilia link to segmentation.

gravity_link: Controls apical actin enrichment and cilia formation; required for directional fluid flow sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Knockout mice display neural tube defects and disorganized vertebral bodies. (DOI: 10.1371/journal.pgen.1002931)
justification: Essential PCP effector for ciliogenesis.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive channel activated by membrane stretch and gravity-induced hydrostatic pressure.
spine_curvature_link: Gain-of-function mutations alter cellular mechanosensing; expressed in bone/muscle.
justification: Mechanosensitive ion channel.

gravity_link: Regulates actomyosin crossbridges and muscle tone; essential for postural maintenance.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Distal Arthrogryposis Type 1 with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2009.11.014)
justification: Direct regulator of muscle tone and posture.

gravity_link: Regulates fibroblast response to mechanical stiffness; essential for limb/spine morphogenesis.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Agnathia-Otocephaly; AIS GWAS hits near PRRX1 locus. (DOI: 10.1038/s41467-018-06619-7)
justification: GWAS link and developmental regulator.

gravity_link: FACIT collagen bridging fibrils; provides shear resistance to cartilage under load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Stickler Syndrome and Multiple Epiphyseal Dysplasia with spinal flattening. (DOI: 10.1002/humu.1380020110)
justification: Structural integrity of cartilage matrix.

gravity_link: Specifies dorsal identity and regulates collagen expression.
spine_curvature_link: Nail-Patella Syndrome causes iliac horns and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0598-7)
justification: Dorso-ventral patterning and collagen regulation.

gravity_link: Crosslinks actin and microtubules (spectraplakin); essential for cytoskeletal tensegrity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause HSAN Type VI with severe kyphoscoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2010.11.010)
justification: Strong neural/cytoskeletal tensegrity link.

gravity_link: Regulates muscle mass and bone density; loss mimics 'failure to thrive' (unloading).
spine_curvature_link: Prader-Willi/Schaaf-Yang Syndrome features high prevalence of scoliosis (80%). (DOI: 10.1136/jmedgenet-2013-102023)
justification: Syndromic link to muscle hypotonia and spine.

gravity_link: PI3K pathway is activated by mechanical stress; regulates cell size and growth.
spine_curvature_link: SHORT syndrome includes spinal anomalies. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2013.06.011)
justification: Growth pathway linked to mechanotransduction.

gravity_link: Regulates ER calcium handling and redox state; essential for muscle excitation-contraction coupling under load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Rigid Spine Muscular Dystrophy (RSMD1); defining feature is severe spinal rigidity and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/S1474-4422(02)00005-1)
justification: Defining gene for 'Rigid Spine' phenotype; links ER stress to postural tone.

gravity_link: Inner nuclear membrane protein; essential for nuclear mechanotransduction via LINC complex.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Emery-Dreifuss Muscular Dystrophy (EDMD); hallmark is early contractures of the spine (rigid spine). (GeneReviews)
justification: Direct link between nuclear mechanics and spinal rigidity.

gravity_link: Giant molecular spring contributing to passive muscle stiffness and integrity against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations linked to various myopathies with spinal involvement; essential for sarcomere length sensing. (DOI: 10.1038/s41576-019-0127-x)
justification: The primary molecular spring of the sarcomere.

gravity_link: Embryonic myosin heavy chain; generates contractile force during development.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Freeman-Sheldon syndrome (Whistling Face), featuring severe scoliosis/kyphosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1823)
justification: Developmental myosin linked to congenital contracture syndromes.

gravity_link: Meckelin; required for ciliary transition zone and Wnt/PCP signaling (flow sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Meckel-Gruber and Joubert syndromes; cerebellar vermis hypoplasia and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1874)
justification: Ciliopathy gene linking PCP defects to spinal alignment.

gravity_link: OASIS; ER stress transducer upregulated during osteoblast differentiation and matrix secretion.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Osteogenesis Imperfecta Type VII; severe bone fragility and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/s41467-017-00566-7)
justification: ER stress sensor critical for bone matrix quality.

gravity_link: Links integrins to actin cytoskeleton; central hub for force transduction.
spine_curvature_link: Chondrocyte-specific deletion leads to dwarfism and skeletal deformities. (DOI: 10.1083/jcb.200105151)
justification: Central hub for integrin-mediated force transduction.

gravity_link: Scaffold protein at focal adhesions; recruits signaling molecules in response to tension.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates osteoclast activity and bone remodeling; potential link via focal adhesion dynamics.
justification: Key focal adhesion scaffold for mechanosignaling.

gravity_link: Muscle-specific calpain; binds Titin and regulates sarcomere remodeling under stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Limb-Girdle Muscular Dystrophy 2A; scoliosis/lordosis is a common feature. (PMC3260027)
justification: Titin-associated protease linked to muscle maintenance.

gravity_link: Stabilizes actin filaments and regulates muscle contraction.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Arthrogryposis (congenital contractures) and Nemaline Myopathy with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng2121)
justification: Regulatory contractile protein linked to congenital contractures.

gravity_link: SERCA2; pumps calcium into ER; regulated by mechanical stress and Piezo1.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Darier disease; links to neuropsychiatric features and potentially skeletal homeostasis via Ca2+.
justification: Calcium pump interacting with Piezo channels.

gravity_link: E-Cadherin; transmits tension at adherens junctions; force-dependent conformation.
spine_curvature_link: Loss of epithelial integrity affects tissue mechanics; essential for notochord boundaries.
justification: Adherens junction force transmission.

gravity_link: Modulates sensitivity of Piezo channels; 'gain knob' for mechanosensation.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for fine-tuning touch/proprioception; loss impairs gravity sensing (mouse). (DOI: 10.1038/nature13042)
justification: Modulator of Piezo sensitivity; relevant for proprioceptive tone.

gravity_link: Drives glymphatic flow; essential for clearing waste from gravity-dependent stagnation.
spine_curvature_link: Glymphatic stasis linked to inflammatory scoliosis; potential 'hydraulic mismatch'. (Theory)
justification: The 'Gatekeeper' of the Glymphatic-Spine link; fluid dynamics.

gravity_link: Secreted into central canal to form Reissner Fiber; senses CSF flow (gravity proxy).
spine_curvature_link: Reissner Fiber is essential for spine straightening in zebrafish; loss causes scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1126/science.aaf9698)
justification: Component of the Reissner Fiber; pseudogene in humans but evolutionarily critical.

gravity_link: Atypical cadherin in Hippo pathway; regulates tissue polarity and growth under stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Hennekam Syndrome with scoliosis; essential for vertebral elongation. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2014.08.014)
justification: Hippo pathway member linked to syndromic scoliosis.

gravity_link: Effector of RhoA; generates actomyosin contractility resisting gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Hyperactivity linked to curve progression; inhibition rescues scoliosis in models. (PMID: 30065020)
justification: Key regulator of cytoskeletal tension and contraction.

gravity_link: Essential for ciliary formation and trafficking; cilia sense fluid flow/gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations linked to AIS; gene knockdown causes scoliosis in zebrafish. (DOI: 10.1371/journal.pgen.1009587)
justification: Zinc finger protein linking ciliary function directly to spinal alignment.

gravity_link: Regulates smooth/non-muscle motility and contractility via myosin phosphorylation.
spine_curvature_link: Genetic variants associated with AIS susceptibility. (DOI: 10.1007/s00586-011-2067-7)
justification: Regulator of myosin contractility.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive channel releasing ATP; regulates osteoblast/chondrocyte differentiation.
spine_curvature_link: Promotes skeletal development; knockout mice show dwarfism and spinal deformities. (DOI: 10.1242/jcs.173005)
justification: Mechanosensitive ATP release channel in bone.

gravity_link: Essential for elastic fiber assembly; provides tissue recoil against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Cutis Laxa with spinal diverticula and curvature. (DOI: 10.1086/339553)
justification: Essential for elastic recoil properties of ECM.

gravity_link: BMP family member regulating joint formation and cartilage maintenance under load.
spine_curvature_link: Variants associated with disc degeneration and skeletal dysplasia (Brachydactyly Type C). (DOI: 10.1038/ng.205)
justification: BMP ligand critical for joint and cartilage health.

gravity_link: Magnesium transporter; Mg2+ is critical for bone/muscle mechanotransduction.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause hypomagnesemia with skeletal anomalies. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2013.12.012)
justification: Magnesium transporter linked to skeletal integrity.

gravity_link: Regulates expression of ECM components required for tissue stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Consistently identified as a top GWAS hit for Adolescent Idiopathic Scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/s41467-018-06619-7)
justification: Strongest GWAS evidence for AIS susceptibility; regulates matrix genes.

gravity_link: Essential for development of proprioceptive neurons (gravity sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Null mutants develop scoliosis due to loss of proprioceptive input. (Blecher et al., 2017)
justification: Primary driver of proprioceptive-dependent spinal alignment.

gravity_link: Required for muscle spindle morphogenesis (gravity/stretch sensors).
spine_curvature_link: Knockout mice lack muscle spindles and develop scoliosis. (Blecher et al., 2017)
justification: Essential for the hardware of muscle proprioception.

gravity_link: Regulates elastic fiber assembly in early development.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Beals Syndrome (Congenital Contractural Arachnodactyly) with kyphoscoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0794-428)
justification: Early developmental paralog of FBN1 causing similar but distinct spinal defects.

gravity_link: HSP47 is the specific chaperone for collagen folding; essential for gravity resistance.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause severe Osteogenesis Imperfecta and scoliosis/platyspondyly. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2009.01.026)
justification: Crucial for collagen structural integrity.

gravity_link: Connects nucleus to actin cytoskeleton (Nesprin-2).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause EDMD5 with early spinal contractures. (UniProt)
justification: LINC complex component linking nucleus to cytoskeletal tension.

gravity_link: Inner nuclear membrane protein anchoring the LINC complex.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations linked to EDMD and nuclear positioning defects in muscle. (PMC4161305)
justification: Anchor of the LINC complex.

gravity_link: Regulates translation of specific Hox mRNAs (segmentation/axial identity).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause 'Tail-short' phenotype with homeotic vertebral transformations. (PMC4445650)
justification: Ribosomal filter for Hox gene translation and vertebral patterning.

gravity_link: Redundant role with SUN1 in LINC complex; essential for nuclear mechanics.
spine_curvature_link: Variants modify severity of EDMD and nuclear-cytoskeletal coupling. (PMC4161305)
justification: Partner of SUN1 in nuclear mechanotransduction.

gravity_link: Muscle-specific caveolin; regulates T-tubule structure and mechanosignaling.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Rippling Muscle Disease and LGMD1C with spinal rigidity. (OMIM)
justification: Muscle-specific membrane mechanosensor.

gravity_link: Acid-sensing channel activated by metabolic waste/pH in loaded discs.
spine_curvature_link: Promotes IVD degeneration and inflammation in the Nucleus Pulposus. (PMC6768050)
justification: Metabolic/Mechanosensor link in the IVD.

gravity_link: Essential for development of proprioceptive neurons (gravity sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Loss of function mutations cause congenital scoliosis due to lack of proprioceptive input. (Blecher et al., 2017)
justification: Primary driver of proprioceptive-dependent spinal alignment.

gravity_link: Forms proton channels in otoconia; essential for otolith formation (gravity sensors).
spine_curvature_link: Vestibular dysfunction is strongly linked to Idiopathic Scoliosis onset. (DOI: 10.1007/s40141-013-0026-6)
justification: Essential for the hardware of vestibular gravity sensing.

gravity_link: Forms tip links in hair cells; primary mechanosensor for gravity in otoliths.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Usher Syndrome; vestibular defects often accompany spinal anomalies. (PubMed: 11138009)
justification: Primary mechanosensor of the vestibular gravity system.

gravity_link: Essential for tensioning tip links in hair cells (gravity sensors).
spine_curvature_link: Usher syndrome 1B; linked to vestibular dysfunction and potential spinal alignment issues.
justification: Motor protein tuning the sensitivity of gravity sensors.

gravity_link: Required for development of Ia afferent sensory neurons (muscle spindles).
spine_curvature_link: Essential for the stretch reflex arc maintaining postural tone against gravity. (Arber et al., 2000)
justification: Transcription factor specifying the gravity-sensing reflex arc.

gravity_link: Regulates ependymal polarity and cilia beating; essential for CSF flow.
spine_curvature_link: Loss causes severe hydrocephalus and scoliosis in zebrafish. (PLOS Biology 2023)
justification: Ependymal polarity regulator linking CSF flow to spine.

gravity_link: Prevents ferroptosis downstream of Piezo1-mediated mechanical overload.
spine_curvature_link: PIEZO1-GPX4 axis drives vertebral growth plate dysplasia in scoliosis. (PMC12533149)
justification: Crucial metabolic guard against mechanically-induced cell death.

gravity_link: Outer dynein arm heavy chain; essential for motile cilia (flow sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Primary Ciliary Dyskinesia (PCD) patients have high prevalence of scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1183/09031936.00046808)
justification: Classic PCD gene with strong scoliosis comorbidity.

gravity_link: Central pair protein essential for ciliary motility and flow sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause hydrocephalus and scoliosis in mice and zebrafish. (UniProt)
justification: Central pair protein linking ciliary motility to spine stability.

gravity_link: Essential for assembly of dynein arms in motile cilia.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause PCD; zmynd10 mutant zebrafish develop scoliosis. (UniProt)
justification: Dynein assembly factor linked to ciliary scoliosis.

gravity_link: Negative regulator of bone growth; signaling is mechanically modulated.
spine_curvature_link: Achondroplasia features spinal stenosis and kyphosis; regulates growth plate mechanics. (PMC3087869)
justification: Major growth plate regulator responsive to load.

gravity_link: Initiates GAG synthesis on proteoglycans (shock absorbers).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Desbuquois dysplasia with severe scoliosis. (UniProt)
justification: Essential for proteoglycan synthesis and cartilage stiffness.

gravity_link: Essential for hindbrain axon crossing in somatosensory/proprioceptive pathways.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Horizontal Gaze Palsy with Progressive Scoliosis (HGPPS). (DOI: 10.1038/ng1295)
justification: Direct link between neural circuit formation (proprioception) and spinal curvature.

gravity_link: Interacts with L1 and Robo; involved in neural circuit formation (proprioception).
spine_curvature_link: GWAS association with Adolescent Idiopathic Scoliosis. (PubMed: 21216876)
justification: Genetic association linking neural adhesion to AIS.

gravity_link: Polyglutamylase essential for ciliary microtubule stability (gravity sensor structure).
spine_curvature_link: Variants associated with AIS; linked to ciliary defects. (PMC11470263)
justification: Cytoskeletal modifier linked to ciliary stability and scoliosis.

gravity_link: Interacts with LINC complex (Sun1/2, Lamin); essential for nuclear-cytoskeletal coupling.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause DYT1 Dystonia, frequently associated with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0997-101)
justification: Nuclear envelope protein linking muscle tone (dystonia) to spinal curvature.

gravity_link: Regulates ciliary signaling and structure; essential for sensing flow/gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Joubert Syndrome, characterized by cerebellar defects and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.180)
justification: Key regulator of ciliary signaling with strong syndromic scoliosis link.

gravity_link: Interacts with Fibrillin-1 (FBN1); essential for microfibril assembly and tissue stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Weill-Marchesani syndrome (short stature, stiff joints, scoliosis). (DOI: 10.1086/423900)
justification: Fibrillin-interacting protease essential for ECM mechanics.

gravity_link: PTHrP regulates chondrocyte differentiation under mechanical load (IHH loop).
spine_curvature_link: Essential for vertebral growth; disruption causes brachydactyly and spinal anomalies. (UniProt)
justification: Central regulator of growth plate pacing under mechanical constraints.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive signaling hub; regulates osteoblast differentiation.
spine_curvature_link: Dominant-negative mutations cause Hyper-IgE (Job's) syndrome, with high scoliosis prevalence. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa073618)
justification: Signaling pathway linking immune dysfunction to severe skeletal/spinal defects.

gravity_link: Essential for dynein arm assembly in motile cilia (flow sensors).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Primary Ciliary Dyskinesia (PCD) with situs inversus and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.718)
justification: Essential component of the ciliary motility machinery linked to curvature.

gravity_link: Essential for basal body and ciliary integrity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause PCD; linked to retinal degeneration and skeletal anomalies. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2014.06.010)
justification: Structural component of cilia essential for function.

gravity_link: Dynein attachment factor essential for ciliary motility.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause PCD with situs inversus and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2012.05.003)
justification: Key factor for dynein arm attachment in motile cilia.

gravity_link: Regulates TGF-beta bioavailability in bone and ECM.
spine_curvature_link: Loss causes dental and spinal defects (scoliosis/kyphosis) in mice and humans. (PubMed: 10655536)
justification: Regulator of TGF-beta signaling critical for spinal ossification.

gravity_link: Transports Manganese (Mn2+), required for integrin activation and mechanotransduction.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause severe progressive scoliosis and hyperostosis. (PubMed: 27153396)
justification: Transporter providing co-factors for integrin-mediated gravity sensing.

gravity_link: Histone acetyltransferase regulating developmental gene expression.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Genitopatellar and Ohdo syndromes, featuring severe scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2011.10.008)
justification: Epigenetic regulator of vertebral development.

gravity_link: Regulates Golgi organization and ECM secretion.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Dyggve-Melchior-Clausen disease (spondyloepimetaphyseal dysplasia). (DOI: 10.1086/367920)
justification: Golgi protein affecting ECM quality and vertebral shape.

gravity_link: Localizes to base of cilia; regulates Hedgehog signaling.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Ellis-van Creveld syndrome (dwarfism, polydactyly, scoliosis). (DOI: 10.1038/73254)
justification: Ciliary basal body protein regulating Hedgehog signaling.

gravity_link: Forms complex with EVC at cilia base.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Ellis-van Creveld syndrome and Weyers acrofacial dysostosis. (DOI: 10.1086/373931)
justification: Partner of EVC in ciliary signaling.

gravity_link: Component of IFT complex A; essential for retrograde ciliary transport.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Sensenbrenner syndrome (Cranioectodermal dysplasia) with skeletal defects. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2010.04.017)
justification: IFT complex component essential for ciliary maintenance.

gravity_link: Kinase involved in ciliogenesis and DNA damage response.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Short-Rib Polydactyly Syndrome (fatal skeletal dysplasia). (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2010.12.003)
justification: Ciliary kinase regulating skeletal formation.

gravity_link: Localizes to cilia; regulates ciliary stability and signaling.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Nephronophthisis with skeletal and spinal anomalies. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.258)
justification: Ciliary kinase linked to fibrocystic/skeletal disease.

gravity_link: FACIT collagen associated with Type I fibrils; regulates fibril diameter and mechanical properties.
spine_curvature_link: Ullrich Congenital Muscular Dystrophy and Bethlem Myopathy cause scoliosis/kyphosis. (DOI: 10.1002/humu.20697)
justification: Structural interface between muscle and ECM; critical for load transmission.

gravity_link: Cytoplasmic dynein heavy chain; drives retrograde transport essential for cellular gravity/stress sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause SMA-LED; associated with severe scoliosis and foot deformities. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.2446)
justification: Motor protein essential for retrograde signaling and neuronal survival in the spine.

gravity_link: Wnt co-receptor driving PCP; aligns tissues against stress vectors.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Robinow Syndrome (recessive) with hemivertebrae and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0400-435)
justification: Key PCP receptor directly linked to vertebral segmentation defects.

gravity_link: Oxidizes lysines in collagen/elastin; essential for tissue tensile strength against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Stickler Syndrome (non-ocular) and early-onset scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1093/hmg/ddv438)
justification: Enzyme determining the stiffness of the spinal column.

gravity_link: Essential for elastic fiber assembly; provides recoil against gravity loading.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Cutis Laxa with severe skeletal anomalies and tortuosity. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2009.09.013)
justification: Critical for elastic fiber integrity in the spine.

gravity_link: Hydroxylates lysines for collagen crosslinking; determines mechanical stability.
spine_curvature_link: Kyphoscoliosis type Ehlers-Danlos Syndrome (EDS VIA) is caused by PLOD1 deficiency. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJM197206222862503)
justification: Defining gene for Kyphoscoliotic EDS; major structural determinant.

gravity_link: Chaperone for collagen and elastin; ensures proper folding for load resistance.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Osteogenesis Imperfecta and Bruck Syndrome (contractures + scoliosis). (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2009.10.023)
justification: Collagen chaperone essential for bone and joint stiffness.

gravity_link: Receptor for TGF-beta; pathway is mechanically activated by ECM strain.
spine_curvature_link: Loeys-Dietz Syndrome Type 1 causes rapidly progressive scoliosis/cervical instability. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1511)
justification: Primary transducer of the mechanically-regulated TGF-beta signal.

gravity_link: FACIT collagen stabilizing cartilage fibrils against compressive load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Stickler Syndrome and Multiple Epiphyseal Dysplasia with spinal defects. (DOI: 10.1086/302008)
justification: Structural component of the intervertebral disc and cartilage.

gravity_link: Cell surface heparan sulfate proteoglycan; regulates Wnt/Hedgehog distribution (morphogen gradients).
spine_curvature_link: Simpson-Golabi-Behmel syndrome causes overgrowth and skeletal segmentation defects/scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0596-76)
justification: Regulator of morphogen gradients determining vertebral size.

gravity_link: Mammalian homolog of OSCA (plant mechanosensor); activated by membrane stretch.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause transient hypomyelination; potential link to neural control of posture. (DOI: 10.1038/s41588-019-0527-4)
justification: New class of mechanosensitive channel; relevance to spine emerging.

gravity_link: Chanzyme (Channel+Kinase); sensing fluid flow and membrane tension.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for skeletal development; zebrafish mutants show curvature. (DOI: 10.1016/j.devcel.2010.02.006)
justification: Dual-function chanzyme critical for skeletal mechanosensing.

gravity_link: Cleaves IGFBP5, releasing IGF-1 locally; regulates bone geometry under load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause short stature and thin long bones; vertebral geometry affected. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1510985)
justification: Regulator of local IGF bioavailability and bone dimensions.

gravity_link: Potassium channel activated by membrane stretch; sets resting potential based on load.
spine_curvature_link: Modulates excitability of motoneurons and sensory neurons; potential role in postural tone. (DOI: 10.1038/nrn1917)
justification: Classic mechanosensitive K+ channel regulating neuronal excitability.

gravity_link: Matricellular protein upregulated by mechanical stress; essential for osteoclast attachment.
spine_curvature_link: Plasma levels correlate with AIS curve severity; regulates bone remodeling balance. (DOI: 10.1016/j.spinee.2016.01.002)
justification: Load-dependent regulator of bone remodeling and mineralization.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive demethylase; reduced H3K9me3 levels observed in soft nuclear environments (microgravity).
spine_curvature_link: Loss of H3K9me3 heterochromatin leads to 'Epigenetic Drift' and genomic instability, a driver of scoliotic progression. (Nava et al., 2020)
justification: Key epigenetic stiffness sensor linking nuclear mechanics to gene expression stability.

gravity_link: Major H3K9me3 methyltransferase; activity is required to maintain nuclear stiffness against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Downregulation linked to cellular senescence and loss of tissue integrity in spinal curvature. (Nava et al., 2020 context)
justification: Writer of the heterochromatin 'stiffness code' protecting the genome.

gravity_link: Master regulator of antioxidant response; activated by unloading-induced oxidative stress (ROS).
spine_curvature_link: ROS-METTL3 axis drives paraspinal muscle asymmetry and atrophy in AIS. (Shao et al., 2025)
justification: Critical defender against microgravity-induced oxidative damage in paraspinal muscles.

gravity_link: Direct target of YAP/TAZ; expression scales with mechanical load and stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Upregulated in ligamentum flavum of scoliosis patients; drives asymmetric fibrosis. (DOI: 10.1096/fj.201802652R)
justification: Major effector of fibrosis and stiffness in response to mechanical load.

gravity_link: Fibrocystin; essential for ciliary sensing of fluid flow (gravity proxy).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause ARPKD and Congenital Hepatic Fibrosis, often associated with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1007/s00439-014-1430-x)
justification: Ciliary mechanosensor linked to syndromic spinal defects.

gravity_link: IFT component essential for ciliary structure and flow sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Sensenbrenner syndrome (Cranioectodermal dysplasia) with narrow thorax and spinal anomalies. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2010.04.017)
justification: IFT protein linking ciliary structure to skeletal form.

gravity_link: Defines posterior half of somites; essential for establishing vertebral boundaries.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations lead to vertebral fusion and segmentation defects (spondylocostal dysostosis-like). (DOI: 10.1038/nature06686)
justification: Transcription factor defining the structural unit of the spine.

gravity_link: Kindlin-2; essential for integrin activation and force transmission at focal adhesions (gravity sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Chondrocyte-specific deletion causes severe kyphosis and dwarfism. (DOI: 10.1371/journal.pgen.1005345)
justification: Direct skeletal defect + mechanotransduction core.

gravity_link: HAT activity regulates expression of mechanosensitive genes during development.
spine_curvature_link: Rubinstein-Taybi Syndrome features scoliosis/kyphosis in >50% of patients. (GeneReviews)
justification: Strong syndromic link to spinal curvature.

gravity_link: Essential for retrograde ciliary transport (IFT-A) and flow sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Mainzer-Saldino syndrome (skeletal dysplasia) with potential spine involvement. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2012.04.014)
justification: Ciliopathy link to skeletal dysplasia.

gravity_link: Major inhibitor of Wnt signaling upregulated in mechanical unloading (microgravity). (DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0033204)
spine_curvature_link: Regulates vertebral bone mass; antibodies prevent unloading-induced bone loss.
justification: Key mediator of unloading-induced bone loss.

gravity_link: Systemic growth factor sensitive to loading status; decreases in spaceflight.
spine_curvature_link: Serum levels correlate with AIS curve progression during pubertal growth spurt. (DOI: 10.1097/BRS.0b013e31816f286d)
justification: Growth factor connecting systemic loading to spine progression.

gravity_link: Specific to hypertrophic chondrocytes in the load-bearing zone of the growth plate.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Schmid Metaphyseal Chondrodysplasia; associated with spinal changes. (DOI: 10.1002/humu.1380010104)
justification: Specific marker of the load-bearing growth plate zone.

gravity_link: Regulates dermis/bone differentiation; implicated in mechanosensory differentiation.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Setleis Syndrome and Ablepharon-Macrostomia Syndrome with skeletal abnormalities. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1419)
justification: Syndromic link via TWIST pathway.

gravity_link: Component of PCP pathway aligning tissue polarity against stress.
spine_curvature_link: PCP pathway defects are a fundamental cause of neural tube defects and scoliosis. (General PCP link)
justification: PCP pathway member.

gravity_link: Promotes osteogenesis via Wnt; signaling is mechanically regulated.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Split-Hand/Foot Malformation 6; Wnt is key for vertebral bone mass. (DOI: 10.1086/521524)
justification: Regulator of bone mass under Wnt control.

gravity_link: Scaffold protein for Wnt destruction complex; negative feedback for mechanosensitive Wnt.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause tooth agenesis and colorectal cancer; Wnt regulation essential for spine. (DOI: 10.1086/382227)
justification: Negative regulator of Wnt mechanosignaling.

gravity_link: Mitochondrial biogenesis master regulator; determines energy SUPPLY capacity.
spine_curvature_link: Energy supply bottleneck during growth spurt contributes to AIS.
justification: Essential for Gamma_m supply side.

gravity_link: Insulin-like growth factor 1 receptor; mediates growth plate signaling under load.
spine_curvature_link: Signaling receptor for growth spurt rate; rapid growth linked to curve progression.
justification: Essential for Gamma_m supply side.

gravity_link: Growth hormone receptor; master regulator of adolescent growth spurt rate.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates the rate of spinal elongation; rapid growth is a risk factor for AIS.
justification: Essential for Gamma_m supply side.

gravity_link: BMAL1; circadian clock TF in intervertebral disc regulating metabolism.
spine_curvature_link: Circadian rhythm disruption linked to disc degeneration and scoliosis.
justification: Essential for Gamma_m supply side.

gravity_link: Integrin alpha-V; mechanosensor activating TGF-beta from latent complex (LAP) upon cytoskeletal tension.
spine_curvature_link: TGF-beta signaling is critical for spine development; deletion leads to cleft palate/skeletal defects. (DOI: 10.1242/dev.00843)
justification: Primary mechanotransducer activating the TGF-beta pathway.

gravity_link: Integrin alpha-5; fibronectin receptor sensing matrix assembly under tension.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for somite boundary formation and maintenance; defects lead to vertebral fusion. (PMID: 8666677)
justification: Required for fibronectin matrix assembly and somite integrity.

gravity_link: Integrin alpha-11; major collagen receptor on MSCs sensing tissue stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates myofibroblast differentiation and fibrosis; potential role in asymmetric stiffness in scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.matbio.2014.01.001)
justification: Key stiffness sensor for mesenchymal stem cells.

gravity_link: LATS1 kinase; phosphorylates YAP/TAZ in response to low stiffness/unloading.
spine_curvature_link: Hippo pathway regulates vertebral growth plate proliferation; loss leads to overgrowth. (DOI: 10.1126/science.1145880)
justification: Core kinase of the Hippo mechanotransduction pathway.

gravity_link: LATS2 kinase; partner of LATS1 in YAP/TAZ regulation under mechanical stress.
spine_curvature_link: Redundant role with LATS1; essential for skeletal development control. (DOI: 10.1038/ncb2207)
justification: Core kinase of the Hippo mechanotransduction pathway.

gravity_link: Dishevelled-2; essential for PCP signaling aligning tissues against stress.
spine_curvature_link: Knockout mice have truncated tails and vertebral segmentation defects (Robinow-like). (DOI: 10.1038/ng856)
justification: PCP effector essential for vertebral segmentation.

gravity_link: Dishevelled-3; PCP signaling mediator.
spine_curvature_link: Dvl3-/- mice exhibit conotruncal heart defects and skeletal malformations. (DOI: 10.1242/dev.01533)
justification: PCP effector linked to skeletal development.

gravity_link: Wnt ligand regulating chondrocyte stacking (PCP) in the growth plate.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for proper vertebral column elongation and segmentation; shortness leads to defects. (DOI: 10.1242/dev.02104)
justification: Regulates oriented cell division in the growth plate.

gravity_link: Wnt receptor (atypical) transducing Wnt5a/PCP signals for tissue polarity.
spine_curvature_link: Ryk-/- mice have skeletal defects including craniofacial and spinal shortening. (DOI: 10.1038/nature03215)
justification: Receptor for Wnt/PCP pathway regulating body axis elongation.

gravity_link: Collagen XXVII; structural component of the cartilage to bone transition.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Steel syndrome (cervical spine instability/scoliosis). (OMIM: 615155)
justification: Defining gene for Steel Syndrome with spinal instability.

gravity_link: Aggrecanase-1; enzyme degrading aggrecan under mechanical stress.
spine_curvature_link: Implicated in intervertebral disc degeneration; activity increases with load. (DOI: 10.1074/jbc.M000254200)
justification: Mechanosensitive enzyme degrading disc matrix.

gravity_link: CCN1; matricellular protein and direct YAP/TAZ target; highly mechanosensitive.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates chondrogenesis; overexpression leads to skeletal defects. (DOI: 10.1074/jbc.M409028200)
justification: Direct transcriptional target of YAP/TAZ mechanotransduction.

gravity_link: CCN3; matricellular protein modulating Notch signaling under stress.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates osteogenesis; mutant mice have skeletal defects. (DOI: 10.1186/1471-213X-6-35)
justification: Matricellular regulator of Notch signaling in bone.

gravity_link: Matrilin-3; filamentous matrix protein essential for cartilage stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Multiple Epiphyseal Dysplasia (MED) and potentially spinal changes. (DOI: 10.1038/ng766)
justification: Structural component of cartilage matrix linked to dysplasia.

gravity_link: Collagen IX; FACIT collagen bridging fibrils and providing shear resistance.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Multiple Epiphyseal Dysplasia (MED) with spinal involvement. (DOI: 10.1086/300460)
justification: FACIT collagen essential for cartilage mechanical integrity.

gravity_link: Hairy and enhancer of split 1; cyclic expression (clock) essential for segmentation timing.
spine_curvature_link: Hes1 loss leads to severe vertebral segmentation defects and fusion. (DOI: 10.1126/science.1070283)
justification: Core component of the segmentation clock oscillator.

gravity_link: Delta-like 1; Notch ligand essential for somite boundary formation.
spine_curvature_link: Null mice have fused vertebrae and severe segmentation defects. (DOI: 10.1038/361699a0)
justification: Essential ligand for establishing somite boundaries.

gravity_link: T-box factor regulating anterior somite identity and sclerotome differentiation.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for vertebral pedicle/lamina formation; maintains segmentation. (DOI: 10.1242/dev.00971)
justification: Regulator of anterior somite polarity and vertebral shape.

gravity_link: Phosphate regulating endopeptidase; regulates bone stiffness via mineralization.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause X-linked hypophosphatemia with rachitic spine deformities/kyphosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0695-130)
justification: Regulator of bone mineralization and mechanical stiffness.

gravity_link: Dentin matrix acidic phosphoprotein 1; essential for osteocyte maturation and load sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Loss leads to osteomalacia and spinal deformity; critical for osteocyte dendrite formation. (DOI: 10.1016/j.cell.2003.11.002)
justification: Key protein for osteocyte mechanosensing and mineralization.

gravity_link: Intraflagellar Transport 80; essential for ciliary assembly and flow sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Jeune Asphyxiating Thoracic Dystrophy with short ribs and spinal anomalies. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.150)
justification: Ciliopathy gene linking flow sensing to thoracic/spinal skeletal defects.

gravity_link: Intraflagellar Transport 172; regulates ciliary signaling (Hedgehog).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Mainzer-Saldino syndrome (skeletal dysplasia) and Jeune syndrome. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2013.10.019)
justification: IFT complex component essential for skeletal ciliogenesis.

gravity_link: Master regulator of hypoxic response; upregulated in IVD under 'Convective Shutdown' (microgravity).
spine_curvature_link: Drives catabolic remodeling and MMP expression in loaded/unloaded discs. (Sato et al. 2025).
justification: Master regulator of the Hypoxic trigger in IVD.

gravity_link: Rev-erb alpha; regulates circadian metabolism and inflammation; target of 'Chrono-Therapy' for jetlag.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for IVD clock function; regulates disc inflammation and degeneration. (Dudek et al. 2017).
justification: Ligand-regulatable clock component linking rhythm to metabolism.

gravity_link: Core clock component (heterodimer with BMAL1); essential for sensing daily load cycles.
spine_curvature_link: IVD has an autonomous clock; disruption leads to degeneration. (Dudek et al. 2017).
justification: The partner of BMAL1 in the core loop.

gravity_link: Main DNA-binding partner of YAP/TAZ; translates mechanical signals into gene expression.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for notochord integrity and vertebral growth plate function. (Dupont et al. 2011 context).
justification: The effector of the YAP/TAZ gravity sensor.

gravity_link: Core clock gene; expression oscillates with load; regulates bone mass.
spine_curvature_link: Mutation affects bone formation and potentially spinal alignment (leptin link). (Fu et al. 2005).
justification: Links circadian rhythm directly to bone mass regulation.

gravity_link: Connects microtubules to focal adhesions; regulates integrin-mediated gravity sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause cerebral palsy with spastic quadriplegia and scoliosis (CPSQ2). (OMIM 612936).
justification: Direct genetic link to spasticity/scoliosis and mechanotransduction.

gravity_link: Forms avb3 integrin (mechanosensor); essential for osteocyte response to fluid flow/load.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates bone remodeling; polymorphisms linked to bone density/spine issues.
justification: Key osteocyte mechanosensor.

gravity_link: Regulates skeletal development; patterning of the dorso-ventral axis.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Cousin syndrome with cervical vertebral anomalies and scapular/pelvic hypoplasia. (PMC2668032).
justification: Defining gene for Cousin syndrome vertebral defects.

gravity_link: Essential for sclerotome differentiation (vertebral body formation).
spine_curvature_link: Pax9-deficient mice lack vertebral bodies; linked to tooth/spine anomalies. (Genes & Dev 1998).
justification: Essential for vertebral body formation.

gravity_link: Collagen receptor (a2b1); senses matrix stiffness and composition.
spine_curvature_link: Expressed in IVD; mediates cell-matrix interaction in nucleus pulposus.
justification: Primary collagen receptor in the IVD.

gravity_link: RhoGAP localized to focal adhesions; negatively regulates RhoA (gravity response).
spine_curvature_link: Essential for embryonic development; regulates cell contractility and shape.
justification: Negative regulator of the RhoA gravity response.

gravity_link: Ciliary phosphatase essential for stability and signaling (flow sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Joubert syndrome (ciliopathy) with skeletal defects. (PMC5685896).
justification: Phosphatase regulating ciliary membrane composition.

gravity_link: Distal appendage protein required for docking the basal body (ciliogenesis).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Nephronophthisis and ciliopathies with skeletal involvement.
justification: Critical for the initial step of ciliogenesis.

gravity_link: Master regulator of cardiovascular and mesodermal differentiation.
spine_curvature_link: Functional redundancy with MESP2 in somite segmentation.
justification: Partner of MESP2 in establishing somite polarity.

gravity_link: Repressor in the core clock loop; essential for rhythm generation.
spine_curvature_link: Part of the IVD autonomous clock.
justification: Essential repressor in the circadian feedback loop.

gravity_link: Localizes to ciliary base; required for ciliogenesis.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Meckel-Gruber and Joubert syndromes (ciliopathies).
justification: Core component of the transition zone in cilia.

gravity_link: YAP partner; regulates lineage specification.
spine_curvature_link: Involved in early embryonic patterning.
justification: Developmental paralog of TEAD1.

gravity_link: Major load-bearing collagen type I alpha 2 chain; essential for tissue stiffness against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Osteogenesis Imperfecta Type I-IV, characterized by severe progressive scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.spam.2014.11.002)
justification: Primary structural failure against gravity in OI; partner of COL1A1.

gravity_link: Collagen VI microfibrils anchor muscle cells to the ECM, transmitting contractile force.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Ullrich Congenital Muscular Dystrophy, featuring severe scoliosis and spinal rigidity. (PMC8283577)
justification: Critical for muscle-matrix coupling and spinal stability.

gravity_link: Collagen VI alpha 3 chain; essential for microfibril assembly and muscle anchorage.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Ullrich CMD and Bethlem Myopathy with prominent spinal deformities. (PMC8283577)
justification: Critical for muscle-matrix coupling and spinal stability.

gravity_link: Giant actin-binding protein regulating thin filament length and force generation against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Nemaline Myopathy Type 2, frequently associated with scoliosis and rigid spine. (DOI: 10.1093/brain/awh615)
justification: Regulator of sarcomere structure and muscle tone.

gravity_link: Skeletal muscle alpha-actin; the core component of the contractile apparatus resisting gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Nemaline Myopathy Type 3 with severe congenital scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1093/brain/awh615)
justification: Core contractile protein essential for postural muscle function.

gravity_link: Tropomyosin 3; regulates actin-myosin interaction and muscle contraction tone.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Nemaline Myopathy Type 1 and Congenital Fiber Type Disproportion with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1093/brain/awh615)
justification: Regulator of muscle contraction and fiber type identity.

gravity_link: Integrin alpha-7; primary laminin receptor in muscle, transmitting force to ECM.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Congenital Muscular Dystrophy with early-onset scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0698-151)
justification: Primary mechanolink between muscle cytoskeleton and ECM.

gravity_link: Troponin T1 (slow skeletal); regulates muscle contraction in postural (slow-twitch) muscles.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Nemaline Myopathy Type 5 (Amish type) with severe scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0600-172)
justification: Essential for function of slow-twitch postural muscles.

gravity_link: Cofilin-2; regulates actin filament dynamics in muscle.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Nemaline Myopathy Type 7 with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2006.11.014)
justification: Regulator of actin dynamics in muscle.

gravity_link: Kelch repeat protein regulating muscle structure and ubiquitin-mediated degradation.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Nemaline Myopathy Type 6 with specific core-rod pathology and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2010.10.019)
justification: Muscle-specific ubiquitin ligase adaptor linked to myopathy.

gravity_link: Leiomodin-3; essential for thin filament nucleation and length regulation in sarcomeres.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Nemaline Myopathy Type 10 with severe scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ncomms6067)
justification: Critical for sarcomere assembly and maintenance.

gravity_link: Promotes stability of thin filament proteins (NEB, LMOD3) essential for gravity resistance.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Nemaline Myopathy Type 8 with severe fetal akinesia and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2013.05.026)
justification: Master stabilizer of the thin filament complex.

gravity_link: Regulates stability of Nebulin; essential for sarcomere integrity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Nemaline Myopathy Type 9 with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2013.10.013)
justification: Stabilizer of Nebulin.

gravity_link: Myopalladin; links sarcomere to nucleus and sarcoplasmic reticulum (mechanotransduction).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Nemaline Myopathy Type 11 and cardiomyopathy; scoliosis observed. (DOI: 10.1016/j.nmd.2016.10.005)
justification: Linker protein in the sarcomeric mechanotransduction network.
