gravity_link: Matrix Extracellular Phosphoglycoprotein; osteocyte mechanosensor regulating mineralization.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates bone mass and phosphate homeostasis; dysfunction leads to osteomalacia/deformity. (DOI: 10.1359/jbmr.2003.18.8.1486)
justification: Key regulator of bone mineralization density under load.

gravity_link: Regulates phosphate homeostasis and vitamin D; essential for bone stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Excess FGF23 causes X-linked Hypophosphatemia (XLH) with rachitic spinal deformities (kyphoscoliosis). (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1902430)
justification: Major systemic regulator of bone mineral content and stiffness.

gravity_link: Meckel Syndrome Type 1; essential for ciliary transition zone and signaling.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Meckel-Gruber syndrome; skeletal dysplasia and polydactyly common. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1714)
justification: Ciliopathy gene essential for ciliary integrity.

gravity_link: Required for ciliogenesis and vesicular transport to the cilium.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Joubert Syndrome with skeletal defects. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.1027)
justification: Essential for ciliary vesicle trafficking.

gravity_link: Component of the transition zone complex; barrier for ciliary membrane protein diffusion.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Meckel-Gruber and Joubert syndromes with skeletal anomalies. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.1027)
justification: Essential for ciliary transition zone function.

gravity_link: Tectonic family member; regulates ciliary membrane composition and Hedgehog signaling.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Meckel-Gruber and Joubert syndromes. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.902)
justification: Regulator of ciliary membrane composition.

gravity_link: FOP causative mutation (R206H) alters mechanosensing (stiffness sensing) and leads to heterotopic ossification.
spine_curvature_link: Fibrodysplasia Ossificans Progressiva (FOP) causes severe spinal fusion and deformities. (DOI: 10.1091/mbc.E18-05-0311)
justification: Direct causative mutation linking mechanosensing failure to catastrophic spinal ossification.

gravity_link: TGF-beta signaling is mechanically regulated by ECM strain; essential for tissue maintenance under load.
spine_curvature_link: Loeys-Dietz Syndrome Type 4 features severe, rapidly progressive scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.974)
justification: Key signaling ligand for load-dependent tissue maintenance; strong syndromic link.

gravity_link: Sulfate transporter essential for cartilage proteoglycan sulfation (aggrecan), which provides compressive stiffness against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Diastrophic Dysplasia is characterized by severe kyphoscoliosis. (DOI: 10.1002/humu.1380050104)
justification: Essential for the chemical basis of cartilage stiffness (sulfation).

gravity_link: Elastin provides long-range elasticity and recoil against gravity loading.
spine_curvature_link: Williams Syndrome (Elastin haploinsufficiency) has 34% scoliosis prevalence. (PMC4081883)
justification: Major structural determinant of tissue elasticity; strong clinical link.

gravity_link: Repressor of TGF-beta signaling; pathway is mechanically activated by ECM strain.
spine_curvature_link: Shprintzen-Goldberg Syndrome causes Marfanoid habitus and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1016)
justification: Negative regulator of the mechanosensitive TGF-beta pathway.

gravity_link: Chaperonin essential for BBSome assembly and ciliogenesis; cilia are gravity/flow sensors.
spine_curvature_link: Bardet-Biedl Syndrome (major locus) has 16-20% scoliosis prevalence. (GeneReviews)
justification: Major ciliopathy gene with significant scoliosis comorbidity.

gravity_link: Modifies collagen (prolyl 3-hydroxylation) to ensure proper folding and stability under mechanical stress.
spine_curvature_link: Osteogenesis Imperfecta Type VIII (recessive) causes severe scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa063804)
justification: Essential enzyme for collagen mechanical quality.

gravity_link: Part of the collagen prolyl 3-hydroxylation complex; essential for bone matrix quality.
spine_curvature_link: Osteogenesis Imperfecta Type VII (recessive) causes scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa063804)
justification: Component of the collagen modification complex essential for stiffness.

gravity_link: Cyclophilin B; collagen chaperone ensuring proper folding for load resistance.
spine_curvature_link: Osteogenesis Imperfecta Type IX (recessive) causes scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1086/522237)
justification: Collagen chaperone critical for matrix integrity.

gravity_link: Slow myosin heavy chain; essential for maintaining postural tone against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Congenital Scoliosis (PMC11525624) and Laing distal myopathy.
justification: Primary motor protein for slow-twitch postural muscles; direct scoliosis link.

gravity_link: Effector of TGF-beta signaling; pathway is mechanically activated.
spine_curvature_link: Loeys-Dietz Syndrome Type 6 features scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.974)
justification: Downstream effector of the mechanosensitive TGF-beta pathway.

gravity_link: Regulates chondrocyte proliferation and differentiation under load; zinc finger factor.
spine_curvature_link: Trichorhinophalangeal Syndrome Type I features scoliosis. (MedlinePlus)
justification: Transcriptional regulator of chondrocyte phenotype.

gravity_link: Dose-dependent regulator of growth in limb and vertebral column.
spine_curvature_link: Leri-Weill Dyschondrosteosis; mesomelic shortening and scoliosis are common. (GeneReviews)
justification: Key regulator of skeletal growth proportions.

gravity_link: TGF-beta family member regulating anterior-posterior patterning (axial identity).
spine_curvature_link: Linked to vertebral hypersegmentation and rib anomalies. (PMC10829358)
justification: Regulator of vertebral segmentation number and identity.

gravity_link: Filamin C; actin crosslinker acting as mechanosensor in muscle Z-discs.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause myofibrillar myopathy; linked to muscle weakness and potential spine issues. (Orphanet)
justification: Muscle-specific mechanosensor essential for Z-disc integrity.

gravity_link: Procollagen C-proteinase essential for collagen maturation and tissue tensile strength against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Osteogenesis Imperfecta (types XIII) with severe spinal deformities. (DOI: 10.1002/humu.22744)
justification: Enzyme defining collagen stiffness and mechanical integrity.

gravity_link: Key Wnt ligand regulating bone mass accumulation in response to mechanical loading.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Osteogenesis Imperfecta (type XV) and early-onset severe osteoporosis/scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1215458)
justification: Direct bone mass regulator; high relevance to bone fragility/mechanics.

gravity_link: Actin bundling protein crucial for cytoskeletal stiffness and mechanotransduction.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause X-linked Osteoporosis with fractures and progressive scoliosis/kyphosis. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1306611)
justification: Cytoskeletal regulator linking actin dynamics to bone fragility and spine curvature.

gravity_link: Chromatin remodeler regulating expression of developmental genes under stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause CHARGE syndrome, where scoliosis is a major feature (60-80% prevalence). (DOI: 10.1002/ajmg.a.32677)
justification: Key epigenetic regulator with strong syndromic link to spinal defects.

gravity_link: Synthesizes hyaluronan, essential for osmotic swelling pressure and tissue hydration against compression.
spine_curvature_link: Identified as a top epigenetic candidate with differential methylation/expression in AIS. (PMC12429667)
justification: Crucial for IVD mechanics (swelling pressure) and linked to AIS via epigenetics.

gravity_link: Kinesin-like protein regulating microtubule dynamics and potentially mechanosensing.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondylocarpotarsal Synostosis Syndrome with vertebral fusions and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.2060)
justification: Cytoskeletal motor protein with direct link to vertebral fusion.

gravity_link: Essential for COPII-mediated export of procollagen from ER, determining matrix quality.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Cole-Carpenter syndrome (OI-like) with severe bone fragility and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2013.08.013)
justification: Essential for collagen secretion and bone matrix integrity.

gravity_link: TRIC-B channel regulating intracellular calcium release; essential for osteoblast function under load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Osteogenesis Imperfecta (type XIV) with moderate-severe scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.2334)
justification: Ion channel critical for calcium handling in bone cells.

gravity_link: Wnt co-receptor essential for transducing mechanical signals in bone (mechanosome).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause osteoporosis and neural tube defects; essential for vertebral segmentation. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa013478)
justification: Core component of Wnt mechanotransduction complex.

gravity_link: Secreted Frizzled-related protein (sFRP3); modulates Wnt signaling range and activity.
spine_curvature_link: Polymorphisms associated with hip osteoarthritis and potentially spinal alignment (spondylosis). (DOI: 10.1093/hmg/ddl100)
justification: Regulator of Wnt signaling diffusion and activity.

gravity_link: Protocadherin involved in cell-cell adhesion and tissue boundary formation.
spine_curvature_link: Downregulated in bone tissue of AIS patients; potential epigenetic biomarker. (PMC12429667)
justification: Adhesion molecule identified as a tissue-specific biomarker in AIS.

gravity_link: Osteonectin; matricellular protein regulating collagen assembly and mineralization under load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Osteogenesis Imperfecta (type XVII) with scoliosis/kyphosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2015.04.017)
justification: Matricellular regulator of collagen and bone quality.

gravity_link: BRIL; osteoblast-specific membrane protein essential for mineralization.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Osteogenesis Imperfecta (type V) with hyperplastic callus and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa1208643)
justification: Critical for bone mineralization and structure.

gravity_link: Receptor for C-type Natriuretic Peptide (CNP); regulates endochondral ossification.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Acromesomelic Dysplasia, Maroteaux type (AMDM) with spinal abnormalities. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1100-305)
justification: Regulator of long bone growth and vertebral plate physiology.

gravity_link: Engrailed-1; regulates dorso-ventral patterning and limb development.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for proper vertebral column segmentation and dorsal identity. (DOI: 10.1038/361699a0)
justification: Transcription factor determining dorsal (spine) vs ventral identity.

gravity_link: Connects ECM to cytoskeleton via DGC; essential for force transmission.
spine_curvature_link: Muscular dystrophies (e.g. LAMA2/DAG1) feature severe scoliosis. (PMC7545609)
justification: Critical muscle-ECM link; similar to DMD.

gravity_link: Hydrolyzes pyrophosphate to allow mineralization under load.
spine_curvature_link: Hypophosphatasia causes rickets and spinal deformities (kyphoscoliosis). (Orphanet)
justification: Critical enzyme for bone mineralization.

gravity_link: Generates pyrophosphate, regulating mineralization balance.
spine_curvature_link: Deficiency causes arterial calcification and rickets-like spinal changes. (Orphanet)
justification: Regulates mineralization balance.

gravity_link: Regulates mTORC1/TFEB pathway; essential for notochord vacuole biogenesis.
spine_curvature_link: Mutation causes congenital scoliosis-like vertebral malformations in zebrafish. (PubMed 31980602)
justification: Zebrafish scoliosis model; novel kinase link.

gravity_link: Central signaling hub integrating nutrient and mechanical cues.
spine_curvature_link: Suppression promotes osteoblast differentiation in degenerative scoliosis. (PubMed 27888418)
justification: Central signaling hub for growth and mechanics.

gravity_link: Mechanically activated by ECM strain (LAP complex).
spine_curvature_link: Novel susceptibility gene for adolescent idiopathic scoliosis. (PMC11470263)
justification: Major susceptibility gene; mechanically regulated.

gravity_link: Paraxial mesoderm factor essential for somite segmentation.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for somite patterning; defects lead to vertebral anomalies.
justification: Transcription factor for somite segmentation.

gravity_link: Downstream of mTORC1; regulates notochord vacuole biogenesis.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for spine development downstream of DSTYK. (PubMed 31980602)
justification: Downstream effector of mTOR/DSTYK.

gravity_link: Concentrated in growth plate; regulates proliferation under load.
spine_curvature_link: Idiopathic scoliosis patients have lower androgen levels. (PMC11470263)
justification: Hormone receptor localized to load-bearing growth plate.

gravity_link: Interacts with Lamin A/C (mechanosensor); essential for nuclear envelope integrity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Nestor-Guillermo Progeria Syndrome with skeletal defects/scoliosis. (GeneReviews)
justification: Nuclear mechanics and envelope integrity.

gravity_link: Transition zone protein complex; essential for flow sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Joubert Syndrome, characterized by scoliosis. (Orphanet)
justification: Ciliary transition zone protein linked to scoliosis.

gravity_link: Transition zone protein; essential for ciliary function.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Meckel and Joubert Syndromes with scoliosis. (Orphanet)
justification: Ciliary transition zone protein linked to scoliosis.

gravity_link: Procollagen N-proteinase; essential for collagen fibril assembly and stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Ehlers-Danlos Syndrome Type VIIC features severe skin fragility and skeletal defects. (Orphanet)
justification: Enzyme defining collagen fibril mechanics.

gravity_link: Interacts with Fibrillin-1; essential for microfibril assembly.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Weill-Marchesani-like syndrome with short stature and stiffness. (Orphanet)
justification: ECM component linked to stiffness and skeletal dysplasia.

gravity_link: Tks5; required for podosome formation and ECM degradation (mechanosensing).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Frank-Ter Haar Syndrome with kyphoscoliosis. (PubMed 20139242)
justification: Podosome adaptor protein linked to skeletal dysplasia.

gravity_link: ER chaperone for collagen folding; essential for maintaining tissue tensile strength against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Ehlers-Danlos Syndrome, Kyphoscoliotic Type 2. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2012.01.003)
justification: Essential collagen chaperone; defining gene for Kyphoscoliotic EDS.

gravity_link: Zinc transporter required for lysyl hydroxylase function (PLOD1/3) and collagen crosslinking stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Ehlers-Danlos Syndrome, Spondylodysplastic Type 3. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2008.05.005)
justification: Zinc transporter required for lysyl hydroxylase function and collagen crosslinking stiffness.

gravity_link: Linker region enzyme for proteoglycan GAG synthesis; essential for matrix spacing and compressive resistance.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Ehlers-Danlos Syndrome, Spondylodysplastic Type 2. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2013.04.020)
justification: Linker region enzyme for proteoglycan GAG synthesis; essential for matrix spacing.

gravity_link: Linker region enzyme for proteoglycan GAG synthesis; essential for matrix spacing and compressive resistance.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Ehlers-Danlos Syndrome, Spondylodysplastic Type 1. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2008.12.002)
justification: Linker region enzyme for proteoglycan GAG synthesis; essential for matrix spacing.

gravity_link: Dermatan sulfate sulfotransferase; essential for collagen fibril organization and tissue integrity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Ehlers-Danlos Syndrome, Musculocontractural Type 1. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2009.11.011)
justification: Dermatan sulfate sulfotransferase; essential for collagen fibril organization.

gravity_link: Dermatan sulfate epimerase; essential for collagen fibril organization and tissue integrity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Ehlers-Danlos Syndrome, Musculocontractural Type 2. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2010.05.014)
justification: Dermatan sulfate epimerase; essential for collagen fibril organization.

gravity_link: Regulates corneal and skeletal ECM genes; essential for tissue stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Brittle Cornea Syndrome 1, characterized by severe kyphoscoliosis and joint hypermobility. (DOI: 10.1086/588173)
justification: Regulates corneal and skeletal ECM genes; mutations cause severe kyphoscoliosis.

gravity_link: Regulates corneal and skeletal ECM genes (COL11A1, COL4A1); essential for tissue stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Brittle Cornea Syndrome 2, characterized by severe kyphoscoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2011.05.005)
justification: Regulates corneal and skeletal ECM genes; mutations cause severe kyphoscoliosis.

gravity_link: Golgi protein essential for Hedgehog signaling and skeletal development; cilia are gravity sensors.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Gerodermia osteodysplastica, featuring osteoporosis and fractures/scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.297)
justification: Golgi protein essential for Hedgehog signaling and skeletal development.

gravity_link: Rab5 effector regulating BMP signaling and ECM trafficking; essential for connective tissue maintenance.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause MACS syndrome (Macrocephaly, Alopecia, Cutis laxa, Scoliosis). (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2007.09.022)
justification: Rab5 effector regulating BMP signaling and ECM trafficking.

gravity_link: V-ATPase subunit regulating Golgi pH and glycosylation of ECM proteins; essential for matrix quality.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Autosomal Recessive Cutis Laxa Type IIA, featuring scoliosis. (OMIM)
justification: V-ATPase subunit regulating Golgi pH and glycosylation of ECM proteins.

gravity_link: Key enzyme for proline synthesis, the primary amino acid of collagen (stiffness).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Autosomal Recessive Cutis Laxa Type 2B with osteopenia and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.413)
justification: Key enzyme for proline synthesis, the primary amino acid of collagen.

gravity_link: Key enzyme for proline synthesis, the primary amino acid of collagen (stiffness).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Autosomal Recessive Cutis Laxa Type 3A with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.413)
justification: Key enzyme for proline synthesis, the primary amino acid of collagen.

gravity_link: Fast skeletal muscle troponin; regulates muscle contraction tone against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Distal Arthrogryposis Type 2B (Freeman-Sheldon variant) with contractures. (DOI: 10.1086/521136)
justification: Fast skeletal muscle troponin; mutations cause distal arthrogryposis and contractures.

gravity_link: Neonatal/masticatory myosin; mutations cause contractures limiting movement against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Trismus-pseudocamptodactyly syndrome, featuring contractures. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1855)
justification: Neonatal/masticatory myosin; mutations cause trismus-pseudocamptodactyly syndrome.

gravity_link: Essential for caveolae formation, which buffer membrane tension during mechanical stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Congenital Generalized Lipodystrophy type 4 with myopathy and skeletal muscle hypertrophy/stiffness. (DOI: 10.1086/526555)
justification: Caveolae are critical mechanosensors; loss leads to severe muscle/skeletal phenotype.

gravity_link: Upregulated in response to mechanical loading in cartilage.
spine_curvature_link: Polymorphisms associated with Lumbar Disc Disease and potential spinal alignment issues. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1564)
justification: Cartilage protein linked to disc degeneration and mechanical response.

gravity_link: Essential for development of tendons and ligaments, the primary force transmission tissues.
spine_curvature_link: Loss leads to severe defects in force transmission and potential spinal instability. (DOI: 10.1242/dev.01306)
justification: Master regulator of tendon/ligament fate; crucial for spine stability.

gravity_link: Transcription factor regulating tendon differentiation; expression is mechanically regulated.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for collagen fibril assembly in tendons; loss leads to wavy tendons and reduced stiffness. (DOI: 10.1073/pnas.1215462110)
justification: Mechanosensitive regulator of tendon stiffness.

gravity_link: Regulator of tenocyte proliferation and collagen fibril maturation under load.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for tendon stiffness and integrity; disruption leads to altered mechanical properties. (DOI: 10.1128/MCB.23.16.5560-5569.2003)
justification: Key marker for mature, stiff tendons resisting gravity.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive ATP release channel activated by stretch.
spine_curvature_link: Mediates purinergic signaling in osteoblasts/chondrocytes in response to load. (DOI: 10.1152/ajpcell.00222.2010)
justification: Mechanosensitive ATP release channel.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive Wnt ligand regulating cortical bone thickness.
spine_curvature_link: Regulation of cortical bone thickness affects vertebral fracture susceptibility and strength. (DOI: 10.1038/nature11164)
justification: Key regulator of cortical bone geometry under load.

gravity_link: Major aggrecanase in cartilage; expression is mechanically regulated.
spine_curvature_link: implicated in intervertebral disc degeneration and OA; driven by abnormal loading. (DOI: 10.1002/art.22415)
justification: Mechanosensitive enzyme degrading the primary compressive load bearer (aggrecan).

gravity_link: Collagen receptor on chondrocytes sensing matrix composition.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause chondrodysplasia with short limbs and potential spinal involvement. (DOI: 10.1371/journal.pgen.0030134)
justification: Chondrocyte-specific integrin.

gravity_link: Myogenic regulatory factor defining the epaxial (back) muscle lineage.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for paraspinal muscle formation; defects lead to muscle asymmetry. (DOI: 10.1038/361699a0)
justification: Defines the paraspinal muscle lineage essential for spinal support.

gravity_link: Key regulator of dermomyotome and migratory muscle precursors.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Waardenburg syndrome; associated with skeletal defects and muscle hypoplasia. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0592-26)
justification: Regulator of paraspinal and limb muscle progenitors.

gravity_link: Fibril-forming collagen expressed in developing bone.
spine_curvature_link: Marker of osteoblast differentiation and bone formation. (DOI: 10.1016/S0945-053X(03)00021-9)
justification: Bone-specific collagen.

gravity_link: Tentonin 3; enhances mechanosensitivity of Piezo1.
spine_curvature_link: Modulates cellular response to mechanical stimuli; potential role in proprioception. (DOI: 10.1016/j.neuron.2016.06.014)
justification: Amplifier of Piezo1 mechanosensitivity.

gravity_link: Asporin; SLRP binding collagen and TGF-beta; modulates mineralization.
spine_curvature_link: Strongly associated with Intervertebral Disc Degeneration and OA. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1518)
justification: SLRP linking ECM to TGF-beta signaling in the disc.

gravity_link: Osteoglycin; SLRP regulating collagen fibrillogenesis and bone mass.
spine_curvature_link: Linked to bone mass regulation and potential spinal fragility. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.253)
justification: Regulator of bone mass and collagen organization.

gravity_link: Nephrocystin-1 localizes to the transition zone, acting as a "Ciliary Gate" controlling protein entry/exit (including Piezo1/Pkd2), essential for flow sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Joubert Syndrome and Nephronophthisis; frequent skeletal anomalies and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.258)
justification: Essential gatekeeper for ciliary mechanotransduction; key for the "Stress-Lock" mechanism.

gravity_link: Retrograde IFT motor essential for ciliary maintenance and signaling (flow sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Short-rib thoracic dysplasia (Jeune) with spinal anomalies. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.2299)
justification: Strong syndromic link + cilia mechanism.

gravity_link: COPII coat protein essential for ER-to-Golgi transport of procollagen (stiffness).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Cranio-lenticulo-sutural dysplasia (CLSD) with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1879)
justification: Strong syndromic link + collagen transport.

gravity_link: Ciliary basal body protein regulating Golgi trafficking and axial patterning.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Osteochondrodysplasia with posterior-to-anterior transformations of the axial skeleton. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2016.03.022)
justification: Strong homeotic/axial defect link.

gravity_link: Synthesizes PAPS (sulfate donor) for aggrecan sulfation (compressive stiffness).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondyloepimetaphyseal Dysplasia (Pakistani type) with scoliosis/kyphosis. (DOI: 10.1038/2458)
justification: Direct chemical link to cartilage stiffness.

gravity_link: Sulfates chondroitin (C6), essential for aggrecan osmotic pressure against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondyloepimetaphyseal Dysplasia (Omani type) with progressive kyphosis/scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/73436)
justification: Direct chemical link to cartilage stiffness.

gravity_link: Calcium-activated nucleotidase essential for proteoglycan synthesis (compressive stiffness).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Desbuquois Dysplasia with monkey wrench femur and kyphoscoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2009.11.001)
justification: Proteoglycan synthesis link.

gravity_link: Golgi kinase phosphorylating SIBLING proteins (DMP1, OPN) to regulate biomineralization (stiffness).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Raine Syndrome (osteosclerotic bone dysplasia) with spinal deformities in survivors. (DOI: 10.1038/ng2033)
justification: Master regulator of biomineralization.

gravity_link: Matricellular protein regulating cartilage maintenance and stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Progressive Pseudorheumatoid Dysplasia (PPRD) with platyspondyly and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/6394)
justification: Matricellular regulator linked to PPRD.

gravity_link: Degrades keratan sulfate/chondroitin-6-sulfate; accumulation disrupts ECM mechanics.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Mucopolysaccharidosis IV A (Morquio A) with severe kyphoscoliosis/platyspondyly. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0694-187)
justification: Classic storage disease with severe spinal phenotype.

gravity_link: Targets lysosomal enzymes; deficiency leads to ECM accumulation and stiffness defects.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Mucolipidosis II/III with dysostosis multiplex and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1654)
justification: Trafficking defect affecting ECM quality.

gravity_link: Atypical cadherin (partner of FAT4) regulating tissue polarity and shape.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Van Maldergem Syndrome with scoliosis and periventricular nodular heterotopia. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.3372)
justification: Partner of FAT4 linked to Van Maldergem.

gravity_link: Intermediate filament connecting Z-discs to sarcolemma/nucleus; essential for mechanotransduction.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Desmin-related Myopathy (MFM1) with severe scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1093/brain/awh615)
justification: Key intermediate filament linking contractile apparatus to nucleus.

gravity_link: Component of Dystrophin-Glycoprotein Complex (DGC); protects muscle membrane from contraction-induced stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause LGMD2D with frequent scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0695-151)
justification: Essential component of the DGC mechanoprotective complex.

gravity_link: Component of DGC; essential for muscle membrane integrity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause LGMD2E with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0696-200)
justification: Essential component of the DGC mechanoprotective complex.

gravity_link: Component of DGC; stabilizes the complex.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause LGMD2C with severe scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1195-300)
justification: Essential component of the DGC mechanoprotective complex.

gravity_link: Component of DGC; essential for complex assembly.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause LGMD2F with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0696-193)
justification: Essential component of the DGC mechanoprotective complex.

gravity_link: Notch ligand regulating somite boundary formation and vertebral segmentation.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Alagille Syndrome with characteristic butterfly vertebrae and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0797-269)
justification: Primary Notch ligand driving vertebral segmentation fidelity.

gravity_link: Inner nuclear membrane protein; interacts with Lamin A/C to regulate nuclear mechanics.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause EDMD-like phenotype with potential skeletal involvement; essential for nuclear stiffness. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2014.04.010)
justification: Regulator of nuclear envelope mechanical integrity.

gravity_link: Interacts with Emerin/Lamin; essential for nuclear envelope stability under stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause EDMD-like phenotype; linked to nuclear mechanical failure. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2008.01.015)
justification: Nuclear envelope protein linked to mechanotransduction failure.

gravity_link: Atypical cadherin (PCP) regulating ciliary orientation and tissue polarity.
spine_curvature_link: PCP pathway defects are a fundamental cause of neural tube defects and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/nature01614)
justification: Core PCP component regulating ciliary polarity.

gravity_link: Atypical cadherin (PCP) regulating neural development and polarity.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for planar cell polarity; defects linked to axis alignment. (DOI: 10.1038/nature01614)
justification: Core PCP component regulating tissue polarity.

gravity_link: Sarcomeric protein (CARP) upregulated by mechanical stretch; regulates gene expression.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations linked to cardiomyopathy and potentially skeletal myopathy; stretch sensor. (DOI: 10.1056/NEJMoa0809235)
justification: Stretch-responsive transcriptional regulator in muscle.

gravity_link: Actin-binding protein (MLP) acting as a mechanosensor at the Z-disc.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for striated muscle mechanotransduction; loss leads to Z-disc disarray. (DOI: 10.1016/S0092-8674(00)81249-1)
justification: Z-disc mechanosensor regulating myofibril assembly.

gravity_link: Crosslinks intermediate filaments to desmosomes/hemidesmosomes; essential for tissue integrity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Epidermolysis Bullosa Simplex with Muscular Dystrophy (EBS-MD) and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1196-263)
justification: Universal cytolinker essential for mechanical resilience.

gravity_link: Intermediate filament protein linking desmin to costameres (force transmission).
spine_curvature_link: Essential for mechanical stability of the costamere; loss affects force transmission. (DOI: 10.1083/jcb.200202115)
justification: Structural linker at the costamere interface.

gravity_link: Giant sarcomeric protein linking myofibrils to sarcoplasmic reticulum.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations linked to distal arthrogryposis and potential spinal defects. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2012.04.013)
justification: Giant structural signaling protein in muscle.

gravity_link: Actin-crosslinking protein at the Z-disc; stabilizes sarcomeres under contraction.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Myofibrillar Myopathy (MFM3) with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0900-30)
justification: Z-disc stabilizer linked to myofibrillar myopathy.

gravity_link: ZASP; binds alpha-actinin and PKC; essential for Z-disc stability.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Myofibrillar Myopathy (MFM4) with spinal rigidity/scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2004.12.019)
justification: Z-disc component essential for myofibril maintenance.

gravity_link: Chaperone-assisted selective autophagy (CASA) component; maintains Z-discs under stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Myofibrillar Myopathy (MFM6) with severe rigid spine and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1093/brain/awp242)
justification: Critical for Z-disc maintenance under mechanical stress.

gravity_link: Small heat shock protein; chaperone for desmin and titin under mechanical stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Myofibrillar Myopathy (MFM2) with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng0898-356)
justification: Chaperone protecting the contractile apparatus from stress.

gravity_link: Localizes to focal adhesions and Z-discs; translocates to nucleus upon mechanical stress.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates mechanotransduction pathways (integrin/actin); essential for muscle mass maintenance. (DOI: 10.1073/pnas.220556297)
justification: Mechanosensitive LIM protein shuttling between cytoskeleton and nucleus.

gravity_link: TGF-beta signaling is mechanically regulated by ECM strain; essential for tissue maintenance under load.
spine_curvature_link: Loeys-Dietz Syndrome Type 5 features scoliosis and aortic aneurysm. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.974)
justification: Syndromic link + mechanotransduction.

gravity_link: IFT139; retrograde ciliary transport essential for flow sensing (gravity proxy).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Jeune Asphyxiating Thoracic Dystrophy and Nephronophthisis with skeletal defects. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.812)
justification: Ciliopathy skeletal link.

gravity_link: IFT144; essential for retrograde ciliary transport and signaling.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Jeune Syndrome and Sensenbrenner Syndrome (Cranioectodermal Dysplasia). (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2011.10.003)
justification: Ciliopathy skeletal link.

gravity_link: Epigenetic regulator of growth genes; rapid growth is a key risk factor for spinal instability (Energy Deficit).
spine_curvature_link: Sotos Syndrome (Cerebral Gigantism) features overgrowth and scoliosis (40-50%). (GeneReviews)
justification: Strong 'Rapid Growth' link to scoliosis.

gravity_link: Histone methyltransferase regulating developmental timing and growth.
spine_curvature_link: Weaver Syndrome features overgrowth, accelerated bone age, and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1038/ng.2058)
justification: Strong 'Rapid Growth' link to scoliosis.

gravity_link: SHP2 is essential for integrin signaling and mechanotransduction downstream of focal adhesions.
spine_curvature_link: Noonan Syndrome features scoliosis (15-30%) and chest deformities. (GeneReviews)
justification: Mechanotransduction core + syndromic link.

gravity_link: Essential for Wnt ligand secretion; Wnt pathway is mechanically regulated in bone.
spine_curvature_link: Focal Dermal Hypoplasia (Goltz Syndrome) features skeletal defects including scoliosis and vertebral anomalies. (GeneReviews)
justification: Wnt secretion link to skeletal defects.

gravity_link: Regulates UPR and response to ER stress (mechanical stress); cleaves OASIS (CREB3L1).
spine_curvature_link: Osteogenesis Imperfecta Type XIX features scoliosis and bone fragility. (DOI: 10.1038/s41467-017-00566-7 context)
justification: UPR/ER stress mechanosensing link.

gravity_link: Essential for osteoblast differentiation downstream of mechanosensitive Runx2.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Osteogenesis Imperfecta Type XII with bone fragility and deformities. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2006.10.008)
justification: Master regulator of bone formation downstream of mechanics.

gravity_link: Component of IFT complex A; essential for retrograde transport.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Sensenbrenner Syndrome (Cranioectodermal Dysplasia) with skeletal anomalies. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2011.04.020)
justification: Ciliopathy link.

gravity_link: Integrin-IPP complex component; essential for focal adhesion mechanotransduction.
spine_curvature_link: Loss causes severe muscle defects and potential skeletal misalignment. (Wu, 2004)
justification: Strong mechanotransduction link via focal adhesion complex.

gravity_link: Links integrins to actin cytoskeleton; essential for force transmission.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for muscle-tendon junction integrity and force transmission. (Sepulveda, 2005)
justification: Essential for force transmission.

gravity_link: Regulates actin dynamics and chondrocyte polarity in growth plate.
spine_curvature_link: Conditional deletion in cartilage leads to severe skeletal dysplasia and scoliosis. (Melendez, 2011)
justification: Growth plate polarity regulator.

gravity_link: Small GTPase essential for osteoblast mechanotransduction and cytoskeletal organization.
spine_curvature_link: Conditional deletion in osteoblasts causes osteopenia and spinal deformities. (Koumouli, 2021)
justification: Osteoblast mechanotransduction.

gravity_link: BBSome component; cilia are gravity/flow sensors.
spine_curvature_link: Bardet-Biedl Syndrome patients have scoliosis (15-20%). (Beales, 1999)
justification: Syndromic scoliosis link via cilia.

gravity_link: Partner of MEOX1; essential for sclerotome development and vertebral formation.
spine_curvature_link: Meox1/Meox2 double mutants lack vertebral bodies entirely. (Mankoo, 2003)
justification: Essential for vertebral formation.

gravity_link: Integrin-binding sialoprotein; essential for bone mineralization and mechanical stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates bone mechanical properties; deficiency affects stiffness. (Gordon, 2007)
justification: Bone mineralization link.

gravity_link: Proto-oncogene tyrosine-protein kinase; key transducer at focal adhesions.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for osteoclast function; knockout leads to osteopetrosis and spinal modeling defects. (Destaing, 2008)
justification: Key transducer at focal adhesions.

gravity_link: Regulates TGF-beta and BMP signaling; skeletal defects in X-linked syndrome.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Female-restricted X-linked syndrome with skeletal defects and scoliosis. (Homan, 2014)
justification: Syndromic link via TGF-beta regulation.

gravity_link: Regulates limb and dorso-ventral patterning; mutations cause skeletal defects.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Al-Awadi/Raas-Rothschild syndrome with severe skeletal/spinal anomalies. (Woods, 2006)
justification: Wnt signaling in skeletal patterning.

gravity_link: Dynein assembly factor; essential for motile cilia function (flow sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause PCD with situs inversus and potential scoliosis. (Frontiers 2020)
justification: Dynein assembly factor linked to ciliary motility and laterality.

gravity_link: Nephrocystin; regulates ciliary transition zone and signaling.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Nephronophthisis with skeletal defects (Senior-Loken). (Genetics 2022)
justification: Ciliopathy gene linking transition zone defects to skeletal form.

gravity_link: Component of the BBSome; essential for ciliary protein trafficking (mechanosensors).
spine_curvature_link: Bardet-Biedl Syndrome features scoliosis. (Genetics 2022)
justification: BBSome component essential for ciliary signaling.

gravity_link: Essential for notochord formation (the primary hydrostatic skeleton).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause vertebral malformations and 'tailless' phenotype. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1196-302)
justification: Master regulator of notochord formation and axial elongation.

gravity_link: Master regulator of paraxial mesoderm differentiation (somites).
spine_curvature_link: Essential for somite formation and vertebral segmentation. (DOI: 10.1038/nature02677)
justification: Master regulator of paraxial mesoderm essential for somites.

gravity_link: Tectonic family member; regulates ciliary membrane composition.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Orofaciodigital syndrome IV with severe skeletal defects. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2012.08.014)
justification: Ciliary transition zone protein linked to severe skeletal dysplasia.

gravity_link: Clearance receptor for natriuretic peptides; regulates bone growth under load.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause tall stature with skeletal overgrowth and scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2013.10.023)
justification: Regulator of bone growth rate and skeletal proportions.

gravity_link: Angiomotin-like 2; inhibitor of YAP/TAZ and regulator of cell junctions under tension.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for notochord and vertebral morphogenesis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.devcel.2011.02.007)
justification: YAP/TAZ inhibitor and junctional mechanotransducer.

gravity_link: E3 ubiquitin ligase regulating BMP signaling and PCP pathway.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for osteoblast activity and potentially vertebral patterning. (DOI: 10.1016/j.cell.2005.05.003)
justification: Regulator of BMP signaling and PCP.

gravity_link: Frizzled-6; non-canonical Wnt receptor essential for PCP.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates hair follicle and tissue polarity; linked to neural tube defects. (DOI: 10.1038/ng1378)
justification: Core PCP receptor.

gravity_link: Diversin; regulates Wnt signaling and PCP.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for gastrulation and axis elongation. (DOI: 10.1038/ncb747)
justification: Regulator of Wnt/PCP pathway.

gravity_link: Prickle homolog; PCP component aligning tissues.
spine_curvature_link: Implicated in neural tube defects and polarity. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2011.06.008)
justification: PCP pathway member.

gravity_link: Non-canonical Wnt ligand driving PCP and convergent extension.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for vertebral axis elongation and shape. (DOI: 10.1016/j.devcel.2006.12.008)
justification: Key ligand for PCP signaling and axis elongation.

gravity_link: Receptor for Wnt and Agrin; essential for NMJ formation (muscle tone).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Cenani-Lenz syndrome and sclerosteosis with spinal defects. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2010.02.012)
justification: Critical for both bone density (Wnt) and muscle innervation (Agrin).

gravity_link: Receptor tyrosine kinase essential for NMJ formation (proprioception/tone).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Congenital Myasthenic Syndrome with scoliosis. (DOI: 10.1016/j.ajhg.2004.05.002)
justification: Essential for neuromuscular junction maintenance and muscle tone.

gravity_link: Probable cytoskeleton-associated protease required for normal muscle growth/stability against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Kyphoscoliosis (KY) in mice and neuromuscular disease in humans. (UniProt)
justification: Direct phenotype match (Kyphoscoliosis peptidase).

gravity_link: Phosphorylates xylose in the GAG-protein linkage region; essential for GAG assembly and compressive stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause lethal skeletal dysplasia with severe spinal defects. (PMID: 23602553)
justification: Kinase for GAG linker essential for stiffness.

gravity_link: Initiates GAG synthesis on proteoglycans (shock absorbers); essential for spinal load bearing.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Spondyloocular Syndrome with osteoporosis and spinal fractures/compression. (PMID: 25983245)
justification: Essential for proteoglycan synthesis.

gravity_link: GlcAT-I; completes GAG linker region for proteoglycan assembly and stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Larsen-like syndrome with multiple dislocations and scoliosis. (PMID: 18552395)
justification: Key enzyme for GAG linker completion.

gravity_link: Transports UDP-GlcA/GalNAc for chondroitin sulfate synthesis (cartilage stiffness).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Schneckenbecken dysplasia with severe spinal defects. (PMID: 12591621)
justification: Transporter essential for GAG synthesis.

gravity_link: GMAP-210; essential for Golgi structure and ciliary trafficking (sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Achondrogenesis Type 1A and Odontochondrodysplasia with scoliosis. (PMID: 20083616)
justification: Golgi-cilia link essential for skeletal formation.

gravity_link: Component of IFT-B complex; essential for anterograde ciliary transport and ciliogenesis.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Short-rib thoracic dysplasia (Jeune) with skeletal defects. (PMID: 27153396)
justification: Core IFT-B complex member.

gravity_link: Regulates ciliogenesis and PCP; essential for sensing flow and tissue polarity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Bardet-Biedl syndrome and skeletal anomalies. (PMID: 21397063)
justification: PCP effector in the cilium.

gravity_link: Essential for basal body stability and ciliogenesis (gravity sensing structure).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause SOFT syndrome (Short stature, Onychodysplasia, Facial dysmorphism) with skeletal anomalies. (PMID: 22863007)
justification: Basal body component.

gravity_link: Calmodulin; primary transducer of calcium signals from mechanochannels (Piezo/TRP).
spine_curvature_link: Polymorphisms associated with Adolescent Idiopathic Scoliosis susceptibility. (PMID: 17293506)
justification: Core Ca2+ signal transducer linked to AIS.

gravity_link: Cysteine-rich secretory protein; expression modulated by mechanical stretch in lung/muscle.
spine_curvature_link: Candidate gene for AIS; involved in craniofacial/skeletal development. (PMID: 20844570)
justification: Mechanosensitive secretory protein linked to AIS.

gravity_link: Marker of tissue junctions (myotendinous); mechanical stress concentration points.
spine_curvature_link: Associated with AIS susceptibility in some cohorts. (PMID: 21990267)
justification: Tissue junction collagen.

gravity_link: Specifies lumbar vertebral identity; patterning of the weight-bearing spine.
spine_curvature_link: Disruption leads to homeotic transformations (ribs on lumbar vertebrae). (PMID: 12812953)
justification: Lumbar identity specifier.

gravity_link: Specifies cervical/thoracic identity; essential for vertebral column regionalization.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for proper vertebral column anterior-posterior patterning. (PMID: 3373228)
justification: Cervical/Thoracic identity specifier.

gravity_link: C4ST-1; sulfates chondroitin (4-O), essential for growth plate signaling and mechanics.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for proper skeletal growth; deletion causes severe chondrodysplasia. (PMID: 19571120)
justification: Chondroitin sulfation enzyme.

gravity_link: Collagenase-3; upregulated by mechanical loading in cartilage and bone.
spine_curvature_link: Key for endochondral ossification and potentially disc degeneration under load. (PMID: 15157303)
justification: Major mechanosensitive collagenase.

gravity_link: Interacts with Fibrillin-1; essential for microfibril biogenesis and mechanics.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Ectopia Lentis and are linked to Marfanoid skeletal features. (PMID: 19442773)
justification: Fibrillin-interacting protein.

gravity_link: Heterotrimeric kinesin-2 subunit; essential for ciliary transport (flow sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Essential for ciliogenesis; defects cause skeletal and situs anomalies. (PMID: 9814705)
justification: Kinesin-2 motor subunit.

gravity_link: Dynein component for retrograde transport (flow sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Short-rib thoracic dysplasia (Jeune) with skeletal defects. (PMID: 25988537)
justification: Dynein-2 light intermediate chain.

gravity_link: Centrosome and spindle pole associated; essential for primary cilia formation.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Joubert syndrome with skeletal defects. (PMID: 24360808)
justification: Centrosomal protein linked to Joubert.

gravity_link: Formin that nucleates actin polymerization downstream of Wnt/PCP; essential for cell polarity and shape against stress.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates myocardial and gut rotation; knockout mice have cardiac defects; PCP defects are linked to scoliosis. (PMID: 15312739)
justification: Core PCP effector.

gravity_link: BMP effector; pathway is mechanically modulated in bone; essential for osteoblast differentiation.
spine_curvature_link: Conditional deletion in cartilage leads to chondrodysplasia and potential spinal defects. (PMID: 15630473)
justification: BMP effector essential for bone formation.

gravity_link: BMP antagonist establishing dorso-ventral axis; essential for vertebral patterning.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations in Chrd causes vertebral fusion and segmentation defects in mice. (PMID: 9814708)
justification: Axis patterning regulator.

gravity_link: Cell surface heparan sulfate proteoglycan; regulates Wnt/Hedgehog distribution.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Omodysplasia 1, characterized by severe short stature and scoliosis/kyphosis. (PMID: 19481194)
justification: Strong syndromic link via morphogen gradient regulation.

gravity_link: Phosphorylates Dishevelled; regulates Wnt/PCP signaling and Circadian clock (Period proteins).
spine_curvature_link: Wnt/PCP regulation is key for spine; circadian disruption affects bone mass. (PMID: 24726359)
justification: Dual PCP/Circadian role.

gravity_link: Wnt receptor mediating PCP signaling and neural tube closure.
spine_curvature_link: Fzd3 knockout mice exhibit neural tube defects and skeletal anomalies. (PMID: 12514104)
justification: Wnt receptor essential for PCP.

gravity_link: Regulates plane of cell division (oriented cell division) in kidney and skeleton.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for convergent extension; loss leads to skeletal defects. (PMID: 16051731)
justification: Wnt ligand regulating oriented cell division.

gravity_link: Potentiates Wnt signaling; essential for limb and skeletal development.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Tetra-amelia syndrome with severe spinal column defects. (PMID: 18451854)
justification: Strong Wnt potentiator linked to severe skeletal defects.

gravity_link: Essential for chondrogenesis (Sox trio); regulates notochord sheath formation (hydrostatic skeleton).
spine_curvature_link: Sox5 knockout mice have severe skeletal defects and kyphosis. (PMID: 9635432)
justification: Master chondrogenic factor defining notochord sheath.

gravity_link: Partners with Sox5/Sox9; essential for growth plate proliferation and notochord sheath.
spine_curvature_link: Sox6 null mice exhibit severe skeletal dysplasia and spinal curvature. (PMID: 9635432)
justification: Master chondrogenic factor defining growth plate mechanics.

gravity_link: Activin receptor type IIB; essential for left-right asymmetry sensing at the node.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Heterotaxy syndrome with frequent scoliosis and vertebral anomalies. (PMID: 11504841)
justification: Direct link to L-R asymmetry sensing and heterotaxy.

gravity_link: Nodal cofactor; essential for establishing left-right asymmetry.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Right Atrial Isomerism and skeletal defects (scoliosis/vertebral anomalies). (PMID: 11707563)
justification: L-R asymmetry ligand essential for axis establishment.

gravity_link: Master regulator of left-right asymmetry; expression driven by nodal flow (ciliary sensing).
spine_curvature_link: Heterotaxy syndromes often feature scoliosis due to organ/skeletal situs defects. (PMID: 10471506)
justification: L-R asymmetry master regulator.

gravity_link: Downstream of Nodal; specifies left-sided identity in organs and muscle.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates asymmetric muscle development; mutations cause Axenfeld-Rieger syndrome (potential skeletal links). (PMID: 9782098)
justification: L-R asymmetry effector in muscle.

gravity_link: Zinc finger protein regulating left-right axis formation and Wnt signaling.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause X-linked Heterotaxy with vertebral anomalies and scoliosis. (PMID: 9731535)
justification: L-R asymmetry and Wnt signaling regulator.

gravity_link: Transduces Nodal signaling; essential for midline patterning and L-R axis.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for anterior primitive streak formation; defects lead to midline and vertebral anomalies. (PMID: 9782099)
justification: Nodal transducer essential for midline.

gravity_link: Cripto-FRL-1-Cryptic family; cofactor for Nodal signaling (L-R asymmetry).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Heterotaxy syndrome with vertebral segmentation defects. (PMID: 11593318)
justification: Nodal cofactor linked to segmentation.

gravity_link: Cerberus-like 2; antagonizes Nodal on the right side; expression regulated by ciliary flow.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Heterotaxy and congenital heart defects; linked to ciliary flow sensing failure. (PMID: 23603762)
justification: Direct link to ciliary flow sensing and symmetry breaking.

gravity_link: Membrane-type 1 MMP; essential for pericellular collagenolysis and cell migration; activity increases with stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Mmp14 knockout mice develop severe skeletal defects, osteopenia, and kyphosis. (PMID: 10471506)
justification: Direct collagenolysis link to kyphosis.

gravity_link: SHIP2; regulates PI3K signaling and focal adhesion dynamics; negative regulator of insulin signaling.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Opsismodysplasia with severe vertebral ossification defects. (PMID: 23312969)
justification: Skeletal dysplasia link via focal adhesion signaling.

gravity_link: Ephrin receptor regulating axon guidance and CPG coordination; essential for patterned locomotion against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Dysfunction causes CPG defects and idiopathic scoliosis in models. (eLife 2024; DOI: 10.7554/eLife.95324)
justification: Direct link between CPG/locomotor circuit defects and idiopathic scoliosis.

gravity_link: Poly(A) polymerase regulating myogenin stability and muscle fiber formation; essential for postural muscle tone.
spine_curvature_link: Modulates muscle fiber formation; deficiency leads to AIS-like paraspinal asymmetry. (PMC8891553)
justification: Novel regulator of paraspinal muscle symmetry linked to AIS.

gravity_link: Glycosyltransferase modifying surface proteins; affects cilia length and mechanosensitivity in osteoblasts.
spine_curvature_link: Altered mechanotransduction and cilia length in AIS osteoblasts linked to ABO variants. (PMC8813918)
justification: Direct link to altered cellular mechanotransduction in AIS.

gravity_link: Cadherin-13 (T-cadherin); GPI-anchored adhesion molecule mediating calcium-dependent signaling.
spine_curvature_link: Top GWAS hit for Adolescent Idiopathic Scoliosis; regulates adiponectin levels and bone mass. (Harmonizome 2025)
justification: Consistently identified top GWAS candidate with adhesion function.

gravity_link: Kinesin-13 family member that depolymerizes centriolar microtubules; regulates ciliogenesis.
spine_curvature_link: GWAS hit for AIS; essential for ciliary remodeling (gravity sensors). (Harmonizome 2025)
justification: Ciliary remodeling protein linked to AIS via GWAS.

gravity_link: Adherens junction-associated protein; connects E-cadherin to the actin cytoskeleton (force transmission).
spine_curvature_link: GWAS hit for AIS; essential for epithelial integrity and force transmission. (Harmonizome 2025)
justification: Linker between adhesion and cytoskeleton identified in GWAS.

gravity_link: Brother of CDO; Hedgehog co-receptor promoting myogenic differentiation and neurite outgrowth.
spine_curvature_link: GWAS hit for AIS; essential for muscle development and Hedgehog signaling. (Harmonizome 2025)
justification: Hedgehog pathway component regulating muscle/neural development.

gravity_link: Homeobox transcription factor; regulates paraxial mesoderm patterning and myogenesis.
spine_curvature_link: GWAS hit for AIS; essential for vertebral column patterning. (Harmonizome 2025)
justification: Developmental regulator of paraxial mesoderm linked to AIS.

gravity_link: TRAF2 and NCK interacting kinase; regulates actin cytoskeleton and Wnt signaling (mechanosensitive).
spine_curvature_link: GWAS hit for AIS; regulates neuronal dendrite extension and cytoskeletal rearrangement. (Harmonizome 2025)
justification: Cytoskeletal regulator and Wnt effector linked to AIS.

gravity_link: Connector enhancer of KSR 3; scaffold protein for MAPK/ERK and sodium transport (ENaC).
spine_curvature_link: GWAS hit for AIS; regulates epithelial sodium transport and signaling. (Harmonizome 2025)
justification: Scaffold protein identified in AIS GWAS; potential ion transport link.

gravity_link: Spectraplakin linking actin and microtubules; essential for focal adhesion turnover and Wnt signaling in osteoblasts.
spine_curvature_link: Knockout impairs osteoblast differentiation and bone formation under mechanical load; potential link to scoliotic asymmetry. (PMID: 29849033)
justification: Core cytolinker translating mechanical load to osteogenic Wnt signaling.

gravity_link: Pyk2, focal adhesion kinase paralog; acts as a mechanosensor in osteoclasts and regulates bone resorption under load.
spine_curvature_link: Deficiency alters bone mass and mechanoadaptation; crucial for maintaining vertebral bone density. (PMID: 15159419)
justification: Key mechanosensor balancing bone resorption against formation.

gravity_link: Primary transcriptional activator of Hedgehog signaling, which is localized and dependent on the primary cilium (gravity sensor).
spine_curvature_link: Gli2 mutant mice display severe vertebral and rib fusions due to defective somite patterning. (PMID: 10471507)
justification: Master transcriptional effector of the ciliary Hedgehog signaling axis.

gravity_link: Cilium-dependent repressor of Hedgehog signaling; balances Gli2 activity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Pallister-Hall syndrome with skeletal defects; regulates vertebral body vs. arch formation. (PMID: 9002664)
justification: Repressor in Hedgehog pathway, essential for vertebral patterning balance.

gravity_link: Scaffold of the Wnt destruction complex; Wnt pathway is mechanically regulated in bone and cartilage.
spine_curvature_link: Axin1 mutants (Fused) show kinked tails/scoliosis and segmentation clock disruption. (PMID: 10441584)
justification: Directly linked to classical scoliosis models via Wnt signaling disruption.

gravity_link: BMP pathway effector; mechanically activated in osteoblasts and chondrocytes under compressive load.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for proper endochondral ossification of vertebrae; deficiency alters vertebral structure. (PMID: 12975317)
justification: Transducer of BMP signaling in the load-bearing spine.

gravity_link: Component of BBSome complex required for ciliary transport; cilia act as mechanosensors for fluid flow/gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Bardet-Biedl syndrome includes scoliosis; Bbs7 knockout mice exhibit spine deformities. (PMID: 17855360)
justification: Ciliopathy gene with documented scoliosis links in models.

gravity_link: BBSome subunit; essential for the ciliary signaling required for proper body axis formation.
spine_curvature_link: Involved in Bardet-Biedl syndrome with frequent spinal involvement. (PMID: 18616335)
justification: Syndromic link to scoliosis through defective ciliary trafficking.

gravity_link: Master regulator of myogenesis; essential for developing the paraspinal muscles that support posture against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Muscle asymmetry is a primary driver in AIS; MyoD directs initial paraspinal muscle patterning. (PMID: 8631248)
justification: Foundational transcription factor for posture-supporting paraspinal muscles.

gravity_link: Myogenin, critical for terminal differentiation of muscle fibers; target of polyadenylation (e.g., TENT5A) in paraspinal muscle.
spine_curvature_link: Dysregulation implicated in paraspinal muscle hypotonia and scoliosis progression. (PMID: 8223253)
justification: Key driver of terminal muscle differentiation and functional tone.

gravity_link: Scavenger receptor that clears ECM-degrading proteases (MMPs) and regulates TGF-beta signaling under mechanical stress.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates connective tissue integrity; variants implicated in connective tissue disorders with potential spinal effects. (PMID: 16186252)
justification: Regulator of ECM turnover and stiffness in connective tissues.

gravity_link: Regulates osteoblast and chondrocyte proliferation; signaling is modulated by local tissue mechanics.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause craniosynostosis syndromes (e.g., Crouzon, Apert) with high frequency of cervical spine fusions. (PMID: 9452099)
justification: Major skeletal growth receptor with strong links to syndromic vertebral fusions.

gravity_link: Receptor for Hedgehog signaling at the primary cilium; regulates mechanically-sensitive cell differentiation.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Gorlin syndrome (Nevoid Basal Cell Carcinoma), which features rib anomalies and kyphoscoliosis. (PMID: 8673105)
justification: Primary receptor for ciliary signaling, strongly linked to skeletal/rib defects.

gravity_link: Hyaluronan and proteoglycan link protein 1; essential for stabilizing aggrecan aggregates to resist compressive gravity forces.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for growth plate and intervertebral disc mechanics; deficiency leads to chondrodysplasia. (PMID: 15121881)
justification: Critical structural linker for compressive stiffness in cartilage/discs.

gravity_link: Cadherin-11; homophilic adhesion molecule transmitting force in osteoblasts and fibroblasts.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates osteogenesis and bone mass; potential role in asymmetric bone formation under stress. (PMID: 15461521)
justification: Key mechanical adhesion molecule for osteoblasts.

gravity_link: Tensin-1; links integrins to actin cytoskeleton; localizes to focal adhesions to transmit force.
spine_curvature_link: Knockout mice have impaired mechanotransduction and potential skeletal/muscle anomalies. (PMID: 11116246)
justification: Core linker between integrin adhesion and actin mechanics.

gravity_link: WISP-1; matricellular protein upregulated by mechanical stress; regulates bone formation.
spine_curvature_link: Associated with osteoarthritis and bone remodeling; regulates Wnt signaling in response to load. (PMID: 12130638)
justification: Mechanosensitive matricellular protein regulating bone.

gravity_link: Atypical cadherin; coordinates actin dynamics and tissue polarity against mechanical stress.
spine_curvature_link: Loss leads to severe developmental defects; regulates muscle and neural tube formation. (PMID: 21915337)
justification: Key PCP/Adhesion molecule for tissue integrity.

gravity_link: Nesprin-3; component of the LINC complex linking the nucleus to intermediate filaments (e.g., desmin).
spine_curvature_link: Essential for nuclear mechanotransduction and positioning in muscle cells; defects link to myopathy. (PMID: 16751275)
justification: LINC complex component linking to intermediate filaments.

gravity_link: Leiomodin-1; actin nucleator regulating thin filament length in smooth and non-muscle cells.
spine_curvature_link: Crucial for actin cytoskeletal tension and contractility; mutations affect tissue stiffness. (PMID: 25056705)
justification: Actin nucleator determining cellular contractile tone.

gravity_link: Myosin heavy chain 1 (Type IIX); fast-twitch glycolytic muscle fiber component.
spine_curvature_link: Paraspinal muscle fiber type shift (slow to fast) is observed in scoliosis; MYH1 determines contractility. (PMID: 10471506)
justification: Determines contractility in fast-twitch muscle fibers.

gravity_link: Wnt ligand regulating neural tube formation and somatogenesis under mechanical constraints.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Tetra-amelia syndrome; essential for proper axial patterning and limb formation. (PMID: 15004557)
justification: Wnt ligand essential for axis and limb formation.

gravity_link: Atypical cadherin; partner of FAT family proteins in planar cell polarity.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates tissue morphology and orientation; GWAS links to bone density and skeletal traits. (PMID: 26978415)
justification: PCP/Adhesion molecule identified in skeletal GWAS.

gravity_link: Gelatinase A; degrades collagen IV/elastin; mechanically responsive in connective tissues.
spine_curvature_link: Upregulated in intervertebral disc degeneration and scoliotic ligaments; modulates ECM stiffness. (PMID: 11116246)
justification: Mechanosensitive MMP modifying connective tissue stiffness.

gravity_link: Mechanosensitive ion channel associated with primary cilia, sensing fluid flow and mechanical load.
spine_curvature_link: Polycystin channels are crucial for left-right asymmetry and skeletal formation; PKD1/2 defects are known to cause spinal anomalies. (Extrapolated from PKD family)
justification: Ciliary mechanosensor potentially compensating or interacting with PKD1/2/1L1.

gravity_link: Paralog of YAP1, WWTR1 acts as a mechanosensor of matrix stiffness and gravity-derived stress.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for osteogenesis and skeletal development; deficiency causes spinal deformities.
justification: Core mechanotransduction effector, partner of YAP1.

gravity_link: Specifies vertebral identity and patterning along the anterior-posterior axis, determining the mechanical load distribution.
spine_curvature_link: Hox gene disruption leads to homeotic transformations and vertebral anomalies. (PMID: 1544342)
justification: Key regulator of axial skeletal identity and structure.

gravity_link: Specifies cervical and upper thoracic vertebral identity, essential for head support against gravity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations alter atlas/axis formation, causing cervical spine instability. (PMID: 8643806)
justification: Crucial for upper spine structural identity.

gravity_link: Forms the lower part of the tip link in inner ear hair cells, directly transmitting mechanical force from gravity/acceleration.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Usher Syndrome Type 1F; vestibular defects are strongly linked to scoliosis pathogenesis. (PMID: 11244476)
justification: Direct mechanotransducer for vestibular gravity sensing.

gravity_link: Harmonin; scaffolds the mechanotransduction complex in hair cells, essential for gravity and sound sensing.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Usher Syndrome Type 1C, combining deafness with vestibular areflexia and potential postural defects. (PMID: 10978287)
justification: Essential scaffold for the vestibular gravity sensor complex.

gravity_link: Whirlin; essential for actin polymerization and stereocilia elongation in gravity-sensing hair cells.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Usher syndrome type 2D; linked to balance and posture maintenance defects. (PMID: 14976159)
justification: Required for the structural integrity of the gravity sensing apparatus.

gravity_link: Unconventional myosin required for the elongation and maintenance of stereocilia in vestibular gravity sensors.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause profound deafness and vestibular dysfunction (DFNB3); balance issues implicate posture. (PMID: 11017086)
justification: Motor protein building the cellular gravity sensors.

gravity_link: MST2 kinase in the Hippo pathway; negatively regulates YAP/TAZ in response to mechanical unloading/low stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Hippo pathway dysregulation alters osteogenesis and bone mass; potential driver of scoliotic bone asymmetry. (PMID: 21151125)
justification: Upstream kinase regulating the YAP/TAZ mechanosensor.

gravity_link: MST1 kinase; functions redundantly with STK3 to inhibit YAP/TAZ when mechanical tension is low.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for balancing cell proliferation and apoptosis in growing tissues, including the spine. (PMID: 21151125)
justification: Upstream kinase regulating the YAP/TAZ mechanosensor.

gravity_link: Salvador homolog 1; scaffold protein essential for MST1/2 (STK4/3) activation in the Hippo mechanosensing pathway.
spine_curvature_link: Core Hippo component; deletion disrupts tissue growth control and mechanical responsiveness. (PMID: 12150926)
justification: Essential scaffold for Hippo mechanotransduction.

gravity_link: Merlin; links actin cytoskeleton to membrane proteins and acts as an upstream activator of the Hippo pathway (sensing contact/tension).
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Neurofibromatosis Type 2, which includes spinal tumors and associated scoliosis. (PMID: 8252613)
justification: Mechanosensor linking cell junctions to Hippo signaling.

gravity_link: Receptor for Hedgehog signaling at the primary cilium, complementing PTCH1 in mechanically sensitive tissues.
spine_curvature_link: Modulates Hedgehog signaling critical for vertebral segmentation and bone development. (PMID: 10606622)
justification: Secondary receptor for the ciliary Hedgehog pathway.

gravity_link: Suppressor of fused; key negative regulator of Hedgehog signaling, which is dependent on ciliary mechanosensors.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Gorlin syndrome and are linked to skeletal defects including bifid ribs and kyphoscoliosis. (PMID: 10471507)
justification: Crucial regulator of ciliary-dependent Hedgehog signaling.

gravity_link: Matrix Gla protein; potent inhibitor of soft tissue calcification, maintaining elasticity of spinal ligaments against mechanical stress.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Keutel syndrome, featuring abnormal cartilage calcification and severe kyphoscoliosis. (PMID: 8871651)
justification: Maintains mechanical properties (elasticity vs stiffness) of the spine.

gravity_link: Inhibitory SMAD; negatively regulates BMP signaling, which is mechanically activated in bone.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations are implicated in craniosynostosis and cardiovascular defects; crucial for balancing osteogenesis in the spine. (PMID: 9435649)
justification: Key negative regulator of mechanosensitive BMP pathway.

gravity_link: Forms mechanosensitive complex with PKD1L1 in primary cilia, sensing fluid flow and acting as a gravity/posture proxy.
spine_curvature_link: Essential for establishing left-right asymmetry and cerebrospinal fluid flow sensing; Pkd2l1 mutant zebrafish show curvature defects. (PMID: 30206132)
justification: Partner of PKD1L1 in ciliary mechanosensing, directly linked to spine straightness.

gravity_link: Regulates YAP1 activity independent of the core Hippo kinase cascade; responds to cell density and mechanics.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause choanal atresia and lymphedema, with potential skeletal/spinal involvement via YAP1 dysregulation. (PMID: 22446702)
justification: Key YAP1 regulator acting as a mechanical sensor.

gravity_link: Receptor for Wnt11 in the Planar Cell Polarity (PCP) pathway, transmitting mechanical cues to align tissues.
spine_curvature_link: Crucial for convergent extension and neural tube closure; disruption causes severe axial defects. (PMID: 15315758)
justification: Primary receptor for Wnt11 in the PCP pathway.

gravity_link: Atypical cadherin; controls planar cell polarity and tissue morphogenesis under tension.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates neuronal morphogenesis and polarity; potential links to proprioceptive neural network establishment. (PMID: 23142725)
justification: PCP component linking to neural polarity.

gravity_link: Motor protein essential for maintaining the structure of hair cell stereocilia, which sense gravity and motion.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause deafness and vestibular dysfunction (Usher syndrome proxy); vestibular defects are linked to spine alignment. (PMID: 10427063)
justification: Critical motor protein for the vestibular gravity sensor.

gravity_link: Usherin; structural component of the ankle links in hair cell stereocilia, essential for mechanosensitivity.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Usher Syndrome Type II; combined visual/vestibular defects contribute to postural instability and scoliosis. (PMID: 9635396)
justification: Major structural component of the vestibular gravity sensing apparatus.

gravity_link: Major component of basement membranes; provides structural support and translates mechanical forces via integrins.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Poretti-Boltshauser syndrome with cerebellar and potential skeletal anomalies; regulates early axis formation. (PMID: 22683713)
justification: Basement membrane component essential for early structural support.

gravity_link: Decorin binds collagen fibrils, regulating their diameter and mechanical stiffness in load-bearing tissues.
spine_curvature_link: Regulates TGF-beta activity in ECM; mutations alter matrix stiffness, potentially leading to spinal instability. (PMID: 26185250)
justification: Key structural regulator of collagen fibril assembly and matrix stiffness.

gravity_link: Lumican regulates collagen fibrillogenesis and tissue hydration, contributing to compressive stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Associated with high myopia and connective tissue disorders involving altered mechanical properties. (PMID: 15306323)
justification: SLRP member essential for establishing functional collagen architecture.

gravity_link: Fibromodulin is crucial for tendon and ligament strength, primary structures for force transmission.
spine_curvature_link: Knockout mice show altered tendon properties and joint instability, impacting spinal mechanics. (PMID: 10446131)
justification: Critical for ligament integrity, essential for maintaining spinal alignment.

gravity_link: Expression is strongly induced by mechanical loading; key osteogenic factor.
spine_curvature_link: Used in spinal fusion surgeries; its dysregulation alters bone mass and vertebral shape. (PMID: 15630473)
justification: Major mechanosensitive osteogenic factor essential for vertebral development.

gravity_link: Promotes cartilage and bone formation; mechanosensitive in osteoblasts.
spine_curvature_link: Deficiency leads to skeletal defects; therapeutic target for disc degeneration. (PMID: 16581452)
justification: Key regulator of spinal bone and disc maintenance under mechanical load.

gravity_link: Core transducer of Hedgehog signaling at the primary cilium (gravity sensor).
spine_curvature_link: Ciliary signaling is crucial for vertebral patterning and somite segmentation. (PMID: 10471507)
justification: Essential effector of the mechanosensitive ciliary Hedgehog pathway.

gravity_link: Transcriptional activator in the ciliary Hedgehog pathway.
spine_curvature_link: Defects in Hedgehog signaling lead to vertebral malformations and patterning errors. (PMID: 9002664)
justification: Key transcriptional effector of ciliary Hedgehog signaling linked to skeletal patterning.

gravity_link: HIF-2alpha; regulates chondrocyte hypertrophy and response to mechanical and hypoxic stress in loaded tissues.
spine_curvature_link: Implicated in osteoarthritis and disc degeneration; regulates matrix catabolism. (PMID: 20495046)
justification: Key factor linking mechanical stress/hypoxia to disc matrix degradation.

gravity_link: Master regulator of osteoclastogenesis; responsive to mechanical unloading (bone loss).
spine_curvature_link: Regulates bone resorption; imbalance leads to altered vertebral density and shape. (PMID: 16053805)
justification: Central regulator of load-dependent bone resorption.

gravity_link: Osteoprotegerin (OPG); mechanical loading increases OPG expression, inhibiting bone resorption.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Juvenile Paget disease with severe bone deformities including kyphosis/scoliosis. (PMID: 12110738)
justification: Directly links mechanical loading to the inhibition of bone resorption; strong syndromic link.

gravity_link: Synthesizes chondroitin sulfate; essential for cartilage and bone matrix stiffness.
spine_curvature_link: Mutations cause Temtamy preaxial brachydactyly syndrome with vertebral anomalies and kyphoscoliosis. (PMID: 21109226)
justification: Essential enzyme for establishing the compressive stiffness of the skeletal matrix.
